Add garlic, chicken broth, cream, and parmesan cheese to skillet and stir continuously
Add the sun dried tomatoes, red pepper flake, oregano, and thyme, and stir together well and bring to a simmer
Add in package of gnocchi island let cook for about 3-4 minutes
Add chicken back to skillet and simmer another minute or two until warmed through and coated in the sauce

recipes.title: Creamy Onion, Spinach, and Chive Pasta

ingredients.raw: 2 medium sweet Vidalia onions, thinly sliced
Kosher salt and pepper to taste
1/3 cup pecorino romano plus more for topping
1 pound curly pasta, such as girelle pasta, pipette rigate, medium shells, etc.
Lower the heat if needed to prevent any browning
Save the boiling water for cooking the pasta later
If desired, add in the rind of a pecorino or parmesan cube

instructions.text: Bring a large pot of water to a boil over high heat
In a separate small saucepan, melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat
Add in the sliced onions and win, then season with salt and reduce heat to medium-low
Stir for 5-10 minutes so onions begin to soften
Cover and cook for 40 minutes, until the onions are very very soft but not brown, uncovering to stir every now and then
While the onions cook, blanch the spinach/chives by adding them to the boiling water, boiling for 30 seconds then immediately transferring to an ice bath using a slotted spoon
Once the greens are cold, squeeze out as much water as possible from the greens
Roughly chop and set aside
For the topping, add guanciale to a medium saute pan
Turn heat to medium-low and cook, stirring, until golden brown and crispy, about 5-7 minutes
Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a paper towel-lined plate
Reduce heat to medium-low and add in panko
Toast panko, stirring constantly until golden brown, then transfer to a bowl
Finely chop the crispy guanciale and toss with the toasted breadcrumbs
Season with pepper and salt if needed, then set aside
When the onions are soft, add them to a blender or a large measuring glass and allow them to cool
Once they’re no longer steaming hot, add blanched greens and cream
Using blender or immersion blender, blend until very smooth
Season with salt and pepper, then add to a pot and heat on medium low
Heavily season boiling water with salt and cook pasta until al dente
Add shredded pecorino to sauce and mix to combine
Once pasta is cooked, reserve a mug full of pasta water, then strain the pasta and add it to pot with sauce
With the heat on low, toss pasta to coat, adding splashes of pasta water as needed to create a nice saucey pasta
Season with salt and pepper to taste
Served topped with 2-3 tablespoons of the panko guanciale topping, additional pecorino, black pepper, and slices of chive, if desired

recipes.title: Creamy Pesto Mac and Cheese with Spinach

ingredients.raw: 3/4 cup grated Romano or Parmesan, plus another 1/4 cup if needed to thicken
This will further thicken the sauce
Make sure the sauce is well seasoned as the flavors will be less concentrated once the pasta and spinach are stirred in

instructions.text: Thaw the spinach at room temperature or in the microwave
Squeeze out the excess water from spinach, then set aside
Bring a large pot of water to a boil, then add the macaroni noodles and cook for 7-10 minutes, or until al dente, then drain the macaroni
While the pasta is cooking, prepare the sauce by first adding the butter and flour to a small sauce pot
Heat and stir the butter and flour over medium heat until it forms a creamy paste and begins to bubble, then continue to stir and cook for about one more minute
Whisk the milk into the butter and flour, then allow it to come up to a simmer, whisking occasionally so the milk doesn’t burn on the bottom
When it reaches a simmer, the sauce will thicken, then turn off the heat
Whisk the Romano (or Parmesan) into the sauce until smooth
Whisk the basil pesto into the sauce
Season the sauce with salt and freshly cracked pepper
Return the cooked and drained pasta to the large pot (heat turned off) and add the thawed spinach
Pour the sauce over top, then stir until everything is combined and coated in sauce

recipes.title: Creamy Sun-Dried Tomato Chicken and Orzo

ingredients.raw: 1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breasts or small thighs, diced
1/3 cup dry white wine, such as Pinot Grigio or Sauvignon Blanc
1/2 cup oil packed sun-dried tomatoes, oil drained

instructions.text: Rub the chicken with 1 tablespoon olive oil, the oregano, paprika, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper
Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet set over medium-high heat
When the oil is shimmering, add the chicken and sear on both sides until golden, about 3-5 minutes per side
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside
To the same skillet, add the butter and melt
Add the shallot, cooking until fragrant, about 3 minutes
Add the garlic and cook for 30 seconds
Add the orzo, cooking until lightly golden, about 1 minute
Add the wine and deglaze the pan
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil, then cook 3-5 minutes, covered
Add the cream, mustard, and lemon juice, bring back to a boil then cook, covered, for about 9 more minutes
Add the spinach and once it begins to wilt add the sun-dried tomatoes and mix
Add the chicken back into the skillet, add parmesan cheese and mix until well combined

ingredients.raw: Half a large eggplant, peeled and sliced thin into disks (about 8 large disks, 7 smaller disks)
1/2 cup parmesan cheese, grated and divided

ingredients.note: 1/2 teaspoon Kosher Salt 1/2 teaspoon Black Pepper 1/2 teaspoon dried oregano 1 teaspoon granulated garlic 1 teaspoon onion powder 1 tablespoon Italian seasoning

ingredients.raw: 6 ounces fresh mozzarella cheese, sliced or shredded
1 ¼ cups marinara sauce (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
1 ½ - 2 cups marinara sauce (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
If desired, add panko to a food processor to to turn into a finer powder

instructions.text: Place sliced eggplant on a paper towel lined tray/ baking sheet and sprinkle with a pinch of Kosher salt
Let eggplant rest for 15 minutes, then replace paper towels and flip eggplant, resting for another 15 minutes, to release moisture
While eggplant is resting, make breadcrumb mixture by combining panko breadcrumbs, 1/4 cup parmesan cheese, cornstarch, and seasoning mix to a shallow dish/ pie plate
In a another shallow dish, add egg and whisk
Preheat oven to 400°F
Pat eggplant dry with a paper towel

Dip the eggplant into the whisked eggs, then breadcrumb mixture, lifting the mixture on top of it and pressing it down firmly until it sticks to the eggplant, then set aside on a plate and repeat with remaining eggplant discs
If eating with pasta, begin boiling water
In a large shallow pan, heat vegetable oil until hot to about 350°F
Add eggplant in batches, cooking each for about 1 ½ - 2 minutes on each side until golden brown, then set aside on a plate lined with paper towels
Once all eggplant is cooked, begin building baked dish by first spraying the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray
Spread about 1/2 cup of marinara sauce on the bottom of the dish
Add eggplant dishes in a single layer, followed by 1/4 cup marinara sauce, 3 ounces mozzarella cheese, and some basil, then repeat with a second layer of eggplant until all eggplant has been added
Sprinkle top of dish with remaining 1/4 cup parmesan cheese
Add pasta to boiling water and cook according to package instructions
Bake eggplant in oven for 5 minutes until cheese has melted
Serve with pasta and enjoy

ingredients.raw: 2 pounds russet potatoes, scrubbed and pierced all over with a fork
66g all-purpose flour, plus extra for dusting
Pasta sauce (store bought or make a homemade sauce, such as marinara- see recipe)
Make sure to simply fold and press down- avoid the smearing motion more commonly used when kneading bread
Use a light touch as you roll, trying to use your palms more than your fingers, and dusting as necessary with flour to prevent sticking
Before cutting up all dough, test one of the pieces with the following steps
it should be soft yet cooked through, without any raw-flour flavor
If using electric oven, leave door to oven open a crack

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 400°F
Scrub and pierce/ poke potatoes to make holes, place on oven rack, and cook for 1 hour
Remove from the oven (with tongs- they’re hot!) and slice in half the long way
After a minute or so, scoop out the inside of the potato into a ricer, and press potato flesh onto a clean work surface, spreading it into an even layer, allowing steam to escape for a few minutes
Beat egg yolks and drizzle over the riced potato
Scoop 1/2 cup flour into a fine-mesh strainer and tap to dust flour all over potatoes
Using a pastry blender or bench scraper, chop down repeatedly all over to cut flour and egg into potato
Using a bench scraper, gather up shaggy potato mass and pat into a loose ball
Press ball flat with hands, then fold in half using bench scraper and press down again
Scoop remaining 1/4 cup flour into sieve and dust all over potato dough
Continue to gently fold and press, just until a uniform dough comes together
Dust potato dough all over with flour and gently form into a log
Clean work area well and dust with fresh flour
Using bench scraper, slice off a roughly 2-inch-thick portion of dough and roll into a snake about 1/2 inch thick
Using bench scraper, cut snake into 1-inch portions, trimming off uneven as needed
Transfer gnocchi to baking sheet lined with parchment paper and repeat with rest of dough
Bring a large pot of very well-salted water to a boil
Using a slotted spatula to scoop them up, transfer gnocchi to boiling water
Stir once very gently with a spider or slotted spoon to prevent sticking
When gnocchi begin to float to the surface, wait about 20 seconds, then taste one
Before boiling gnocchi, prepare sauce in a sauce pan
Cook all gnocchis right before you are planning to eat them
Transfer cooked gnocchis to the sauce
Add mozzarella cheese and fresh shredded basil (optional)
Place in oven, uncovered and broil until cheese is melted/ bubbly (about 5 minutes)

ingredients.raw: 16-ounce package of vacuum sealed fresh gnocchi
Pasta sauce (store bought or see recipe for homemade marinara sauce)

instructions.text: Prepare sauce in a sauce pan
Cook gnocchi according to package instructions
Transfer cooked gnocchis to the sauce
Add mozzarella cheese and fresh shredded basil (optional)
Place in oven, uncovered and broil until cheese is melted/ bubbly, about 5 minutes
If using electric oven, leave door to oven open a crack

recipes.title: Sheet Pan Roasted Gnocchi and Vegetables

ingredients.raw: Veggies of your choice such as:
ingredients.note: 1/2 pint grape or cherry tomatoes 1 red bell pepper, cut into large bite size pieces 1/2 red onion, cut into large bite size pieces 5 ounces cremini mushrooms, halved or quartered 8 asparagus stalks trimmed and cut into 2 inch pieces

ingredients.raw: 3 or 4 links of sweet apple chicken sausage, cut into bite size pieces
1/4 cup freshly shaved parmesan cheese, for topping
You want the tomatoes to be bursting and the peppers to be soft and caramelized
The brown butter is done once you see the milk solids turning a golden/brown colour and you smell a nutty aroma

instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 425°F convection and line a baking sheet with parchment paper or aluminum foil and spray with nonstick spray
Combine all of the ingredients except the cheese in a large bowl and toss until combined
Spread the mixture onto the baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, tossing once during cook time
While the vegetables are roasting, prepare the brown butter sauce by heating a light-bottomed medium-sized saucepan over medium heat
Melt the butter and once the butter is bubbling, add the smashed garlic and cook for about a minute, stirring frequently
Remove the garlic, add the basil to the butter, and continue to stir frequently
Once sauce is done, pour it into a heat-safe bowl so it stops cooking and doesn't burn
Sprinkle with the parmesan cheese and drizzle the sauce over the gnocchi

recipes.title: Homemade Pasta
notes: Uncooked pasta can last in the fridge, covered, for 3 days or in the freezer for 1 month*
https://www.biggerbolderbaking.com/homemade-pasta-2-ingredient/

ingredients.raw: This will be a messy process and may take some time (5-10 minutes)
If your dough is on the dry side you can add a little SPLASH of water to bring it together
You want it to get as thin as possible (paper thin)
If you think it’s thin enough, keep rolling until it’s even thinner
Can take anywhere from 2-10 minutes depending on how much you are cooking

instructions.text: On a large flat clean surface pour the flour in a mound
Crack all 4 large eggs into the center of the mound of flour creating a well to hold the eggs
Using a light hand, break the yolks of the egg and gently bring the flour into the center of the well using your fingertips
Keep incorporating the flour into the eggs until all the flour has been absorbed and the dough starts to form into a smooth yellow dough
When the dough forms a ball, cover tightly with cling wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes and up to 18 hours to allow the dough the rest and the gluten to develop
After resting, remove the dough from the fridge and cut it into 4 equal pieces
Set aside and cover with a towel to stop it from drying out
Lightly flour your work surface and rolling pin and roll 1 ball of dough at a time into a large thin sheet
From here, you can make any shape of pasta you want - the rest of this recipe describes the process to make fettuccine/ tagliatelle:
Once dough has been rolled into a thin sheet, fold it over itself several times like a log
Cut the roll of pasta into strips however thick you want
Dust some flour over the sliced strips of dough and unravel to reveal your fresh pasta
Repeat this process with the remaining dough
Set cut pasta aside on a tray and leave it out at room temperature to cook or cover and place in the fridge to be cooked later
Place a medium pot over medium-high heat and boil 8 cups of water
Once the water is boiling, add salt and place the fresh pasta in the water
Add the pasta and allow to cook until the pasta is floating and tender
Strain the water off the pasta and serve

ingredients.raw: 1 ¼ pounds sweet Italian turkey sausage, casings removed
2 jars of favorite marinara sauce or 2 batches of homemade sauce (see recipe)
About 10 ounces of lasagna noodles (“no-boil” noodles are easier)
You may have leftover sauce - that’s okay serve it on the side

instructions.text: Preheat the oven to 400°F
Heat the olive oil in a large (10 to 12-inch) skillet
Add the onion and mushrooms, season with salt and pepper and cook for 5 minutes over medium-low heat, until translucent
Add the garlic and cook for 1 more minute
Add the sausage and cook over medium-low heat, breaking it up with a fork, for 8 to 10 minutes, or until nicely browned
Add 1 jar of sauce (or half the homemade sauce) and simmer, uncovered, over medium-low heat, for 15 to 20 minutes, until thickened
If not using no-boil noodles, fill a large bowl with the hottest tap water, add the noodles and allow them to sit in the water for 20 minute, then drain
In a medium bowl, combine the ricotta, 1 cup of Parmesan, the egg, basil, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper, then set aside
In the bottom of a 9x13-inch deep-dish baking dish, add a couple ladlefuls of the leftover plain sauce and spread out in an even layer
Arrange a layer of the lasagna noodles to completely cover the sauce
Spread half of the ricotta mixture over the pasta
Sprinkle a layer of shredded mozzarella and 1/4 cup of the parmesan over the ricotta mixture
Then spread half of the meat sauce mixture on top of the cheeses
Place a layer of noodles going in the other direction as the first layer
Spread the remaining half of the ricotta mixture over the pasta
Sprinkle a layer of shredded mozzarella and 1/4 cup of the parmesan over the ricotta mixture
Then spread the remaining half of the meat sauce mixture on top of the cheeses
Place a final layer of noodles on top of the meat sauce going in the same direction as the first layer
Spread a couple of ladlefuls of the remaining plain sauce over the noodles
Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella and parmesan
Cover with a sheet of parchment paper and then cover with foil
Put baking dish on top of a cookie sheet before putting in the oven to catch overflow
Bake for 1 hour, remove foil and parchment paper
Return to oven for 10-15 minutes until cheese is slightly browned
Remove from oven and let rest about 15 minutes before cutting

ingredients.note: Garlic powder Oregano Onion powder Dried Basil leaves

ingredients.raw: 2 jars of favorite marinara sauce or 2 batches of homemade sauce (see recipe)
2 1-pound blocks of dried Mozzarella cheese (such as Dragoni), divided
8-ounce bag of the Italian blend shredded cheese

instructions.text: Boil water and cook lasagna noodles
In a pan, add hamburger meat and all seasonings and cook until browned
Brown meat and drain off all the fat
Dice about 3/4 of one block of mozzarella cheese into small cubes
Make a ricotta blend by combining the cubed mozzarella, ricotta cheese, and eggs
Slice the rest of the mozzarella fairly thin
In a 9x13-inch deep-dish baking dish, begin building the lasagna by spreading a thin layer of marinara sauce on the bottom of the pan
Continue building the lasagna by alternating between the following two layers until you have just about filled the pan and used a majority of the ingredients:
Finish with a layer of noodles, then sauce, then mozzarella slices, and sprinkle the Italian blend cheese across the top
Bake at 375°F for about 1 hour until bubbly and the top has browned a little

recipes.title: Chicken Parmesan Lasagna
notes: https://www.skinnytaste.com/chicken-parmesan-lasagna/

ingredients.raw: 4 8-ounce (32 ounces total) boneless, skinless chicken breasts, sliced in half lengthwise to make 8
1/2 cup grated Pecorino Romano or Parmesan cheese
1/4 cup fresh chopped basil, plus more for garnish
4 ¾ cups homemade or jarred (about 2) marinara sauce

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 425°F and spray a large baking sheet lightly with spray
Combine breadcrumbs and parmesan cheese in a bowl
Beat the egg in another bowl
Dip the chicken into the eggs, then into the breadcrumb mixture, then discard the remaining crumbs
Place the chicken on the prepared baking sheet, lightly spray the top with oil and bake in the oven for 25 minutes, do not turn
When done, remove from the oven and reduce oven temp to 400°F
Meanwhile, combine the ricotta, parmesan cheese, and basil in a medium bowl
In a 9x13x3-inch deep baking dish, spoon 3/4 cup of marinara on the bottom of the dish
Arrange 3 lasagna noodles across the dish (they will expand as they cook), top with 3/4 cup sauce, 4 pieces of chicken, 1/4 of the ricotta cheese mixture, 1/2 cup mozzarella cheese, 3/4 cup spinach
Repeat the 2nd layer, skipping the chicken
Repeat the 3rd layer with the chicken, and the 4th layer without the chicken
For the 5th layer, spread the last 3 sheets of pasta noodles with the remaining 1 ½ cups of marinara sauce on top
Cover with foil and bake in a 400°F oven in the center rack for 50 minutes
Uncover, add the remaining cup of mozzarella and bake until melted, about 5 minutes
Remove from oven and let it rest 15 minutes before serving

ingredients.raw: Plain or Italian seasoned bread crumbs (optional)
If directions don’t say how to cook al dente, cook for package time less 2-3 minutes
Start with a little bit getting mixture to blend, then can whisk in rest of the milk
If eating a few hours later can just sit out
If making in the morning and baking at night or the next day, put in fridge
ingredients.note: When going to cook, put it in the oven before you turn it on, then preheat oven and once heated, start timer to cook for 30 min

ingredients.raw: If not having it for a few days, cook it, then freeze it, and then can just heat in microwave when eating it later

instructions.text: Boil water to cook macaroni and preheat oven to 375°
Dice onion into very small pieces
Cut butter into 4 pieces
Cut block of cheese into cubes
Cook macaroni al dente as directed
While macaroni is cooking, melt butter over medium heat in a medium pot
Once melted, add onion, salt, and pepper over medium heat, and cook until onion is soft and translucent
Whisk in flour, cook over low heat whisking constantly, until mixture is smooth and bubbly
Whisk in milk, slowly
Raise the temperature and heat to a real boil, whisking constantly
Once boiling continue to whisk until thickened for about 1 minute
Remove from heat, and stir in cheese with spoon/ spatula until melted
Combine macaroni and cheese sauce (whichever pot is bigger)
Spray casserole dish/ baking dish with cooking spray and pour mac and cheese in dish
Optional: sprinkle bread crumbs
Bake uncovered at 375° for 30 minutes

ingredients.raw: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 tablespoons chopped fresh Italian parsley leaves
Use a pastry bag or a ziploc bag with a corner cut off

instructions.text: Heat a heavy medium skillet over medium heat
Add 1 teaspoon of the olive oil, onion, and the sausage and season with salt and pepper
Saute until the meat browns and the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes, then remove from the heat and cool
Brush 1 teaspoon of oil over a large baking sheet
Cook the manicotti in a large pot of boiling salted water until slightly softened, but still very firm to the bite, about 4-6 minutes
Using a slotted spoon, transfer manicotti from the pot to the oiled baking sheet and cool
Combine the ricotta, 1 ½ - 2 cups mozzarella cheese, 1/2 cup Parmesan, and parsley
Add the garlic, salt, and pepper to taste, and mix
Stir the cooled meat mixture into the cheese mixture
Preheat the oven to 350°F
Spray the bottom of a 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish with nonstick spray
Spoon 1 ½ cups of the marinara sauce over the bottom of the prepared dish
Fill the manicotti with the cheese-meat mixture
Arrange the stuffed pasta in a single layer in the prepared dish and spoon the remaining sauce over
Sprinkle the remaining 1 ½ cups of mozzarella cheese, then the remaining 1/2 cup of Parmesan over the stuffed pasta
Bake the manicotti uncovered until heated through and the sauce bubbles on the sides of the dish, about 30-35 minutes
Let the manicotti stand for 5 minutes and serve

ingredients.raw: 1/2 yellow onion, diced small (can use food processor)
1/2 cup red wine, such as Chianti (optional)
1 tablespoon chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley (or 1 teaspoon dried)
1 tablespoon chopped fresh basil (or 1 teaspoon dried)
Bake until the meatballs are browned and cooked through or and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of a meatball registers 165°F

instructions.text: Chop onions
Heat the olive oil in pan
Add the onion and saute over medium heat until translucent for about 5 minutes
Add 1/2 teaspoon salt while onions are cooking
Mince and add garlic and cook for 1 more minute, constantly stirring
Add the tomato paste and cook, stirring until softened for about 2 minutes
If using, add the wine and cook on high heat, scraping up all the brown bits in the pan, until almost all the liquid evaporates for about 3 minutes
Stir in the tomatoes, basil, oregano, parsley, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and pepper
Simmer sauce for at least 15 minutes (you can add in meatballs after about a half hour)
Add garlic to pan with onions and cook for another 30 seconds - 1 minute until fragrant
Preheat oven to 400°F convection
In a 9x13-inch baking dish, pour canned tomatoes, cooked onions and garlic, tomato paste, parsley, basil, oregano, Black Pepper and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt, and mix until well combined
Put baking dish in oven, or if using meatballs, add meatball rack above baking dish, then place in oven and bake for about 25-30 minutes
Remove from oven, mix up the sauce, and add meatballs to sauce
Place back in oven for another 5-10 minutes, turn off oven, and leave in until ready to eat
Mix up the sauce and serve with pasta, meatballs, etc.

recipes.title: Orecchiette with Butternut Squash and Sausage

ingredients.raw: 2 Italian sausages (turkey or pork) removed from casings and crumbled
1 lb butternut squash ½ inch dice
Reserve 1 ½ cups cooking water, then drain

instructions.text: Ingredients
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil
Combine the olive oil, garlic and sausage in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat
Cook, stirring occasionally, until the sausage is cooked through, about 5 minutes
Remove the garlic and sausage with a slotted spoon to a plate, keeping all the oil in the skillet
Add the squash to the skillet and season with salt
Cook, stirring occasionally, until the squash is lightly browned and tender, 8-10 minutes
Stir in the oregano and red pepper flakes
When you add the squash to the skillet, add the pasta to the boiling water and cook as the label directs for al dente
Add the sausage and garlic, pasta and 1 cup cooking water to the skillet with the squash
Cook, tossing occasionally, until the pasta is well coated, about 1 minute
Add more of the remaining cooking water if the mixture seems dry and season with salt
If using, add spinach or arugula and mix in until wilted
Divide the pasta among bowls
Top with the Parmesan and serve

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ cups heavy cream or half and half
3 cups baby spinach leaves (see note 1 for substitutions)
1 ½ cups Parmesan cheese, freshly grated, plus extra for garnish
Optional: Freshly chopped parsley, for garnish

instructions.text: In a large saucepan or deep skillet, melt butter and drizzle olive oil over medium heat
Add shallot and garlic and cook until shallot has softened and garlic is fragrant, about 2 minutes
Add the orzo and cook with shallot and garlic for 2 minutes to toast orzo
Add chicken stock, heavy cream, lemon juice, and Dijon mustard and stir to combine
Raise temperature and bring to a boil
Once boiling, reduce head to low so that it is simmering
Cover and cook for 10-12 minutes until liquid is almost absorbed
Stir in parmesan cheese and season with salt and pepper
Add spinach leaves and mix to wilt spinach, then cover and allow to sit for 2 minutes
Serve orzo, garnished with fresh parsley and additional parmesan cheese, if desired

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ cups small-diced feta, preferably Greek (4 ounces)

instructions.text: In a large saucepan, bring 3 quarts of water to a boil
Add 2 teaspoons salt and the orzo
Return the water to a boil and simmer uncovered for 9-11 minutes, until the orzo is al dente, then drain
Transfer the orzo to a bowl and stir in the lemon zest, lemon juice, olive oil, dill, 2 teaspoons salt, and 1 teaspoon pepper
Fold in the feta and serve hot

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ cups milk or half and half
3/4 cup parmesan cheese, plus more to top

instructions.text: In a pan, heat 2-3 tablespoons olive oil over medium-low heat
Add onion and garlic to pan and saute until fragrant
Once onions are soft, add orzo and toast until it is a light brown color
Season to taste with salt and pepper
Add chicken stock and milk and stir together
Bring pan to a boil, reduce heat to low, cover with a lid and let simmer for about 10 minutes until the orzo absorbs all the liquid
Add parmesan cheese to pan and stir until fully combined and creamy
Serve with additional parmesan cheese and red pepper flakes

ingredients.note: Can substitute with 3/4 ounce parmigiano cheese, but may need to add a little more salt - taste first)
Can substitute with a handful of walnuts, cashews, or almonds, and add more to desired taste

instructions.text: Process parmesan cheese in food processor until crumbly
Add the nuts and process until crumbly
Add the basil, garlic, and salt, and process until crumbly and combined
Add in olive oil and then lemon juice and continue to process until smooth
If needed to reach desired consistency, add water 1 tablespoon at a time

ingredients.raw: 2 tomatoes, chopped, or a 14-ounce can petite diced tomatoes, drained
1 tablespoons of each fresh herb, chopped, or 1/2 teaspoon of each dried herb:
ingredients.note: Oregano Basil Parsley

instructions.text: In a saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat
Once oil is shimmering, saute onion for 2 minutes
Add garlic and saute for another 30 seconds
Add tomatoes and herbs, and continue to cook for 5 minutes until the tomatoes soften
Season with salt, pepper and sugar
Serve with pasta of your choice

recipes.title: Risotto
notes: Instant Pot*

ingredients.note: can be substituted with "Short Grain White Pearl" rice

ingredients.raw: 4 cups of low sodium chicken or vegetable broth
Ensure all the rice is coated with butter
Give it a quick stir to mix everything together
Don't want to brown the rice
We used 2 pinches of salt for seasoning

instructions.text: To saute onions and garlic: Heat up Instant Pot using “Sauté More” function and wait until Instant Pot says “HOT”
Add 1 tablespoon olive oil in Instant Pot and ensure the whole bottom is coated with oil
Saute diced onions or shallots for 2 minutes in Instant Pot
Add in minced garlic, then saute for another 30 seconds until fragrant
To toast Arborio Rice in Instant Pot: Add 2 tablespoons unsalted butter to Instant Pot
Pour arborio rice into Instant Pot and toast arborio rice in Instant Pot for 2-3 minutes to give the dish a really nice nutty flavor
Ensure the arborio rice’s edges become translucent, while the center remains white
Pour dry white wine in Instant Pot, then deglaze by scrubbing all the flavorful brown bits off the bottom of the pot
Let the wine simmer for roughly a minute to allow the alcohol to evaporate
Add 4 cups unsalted chicken stock in Instant Pot and give it a quick mix and make sure no rice is sticking to the sides of the Instant Pot
With Venting Knob in Venting Position, close the lid, then turn Venting Knob to Sealing Position
Pressure Cook at High Pressure 5 minutes plus Quick Release, then open the lid carefully
Mix risotto (It will look a little soupy)
Add freshly grated Parmesan cheese and mix well to melt the cheese
When risotto reaches desired consistency, taste and season with kosher salt and pepper

ingredients.raw: 1 cup grated parmesan, plus extra to serve (optional)
½ a bunch of fresh flat-leaf parsley (approx 15g)

recipes.title: Shrimp Scampi
notes: For easier serving, scoop out just the shrimp into each person’s bowl then pour remaining sauce over each dish after

ingredients.raw: 1 pound shrimp (7 extra large or “21-25” count per person)
Box of pasta (however much needed for 4 people)
2 tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil
1 tablespoon cornstarch whisked with 2 tablespoons of water
If water boils before you are ready to cook, lower temp until ready
ingredients.note: when ready to cook pasta, raise temp and bring to boil again

ingredients.raw: Only grate the outer yellow layer of skin - do not get the white part (very bitter)

instructions.text: Shell the shrimp and lay side by side on a plate
Season shrimp with salt and pepper
Begin to boil water
Dice and seed tomatoes and set aside
In a small bowl, place diced shallots, 3 minced garlic cloves, and red pepper flakes (don’t need to actually mix) and set aside
Wash lemon, grate the outside and juice the lemon (do over strainer to get rid of seeds)
Pour wine into measuring glass and set aside
Grate cheese for sprinkling at end and set aside
Melt 1 tablespoon of butter and 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat
Add pasta to boiling water (make sure to raise heat of stove to re-boil water, if needed)
Add shrimp and the last clove of minced garlic to pan and saute until pink
Take out shrimp and set aside on a plate
Add another tablespoon of olive oil to pan
Add shallots, garlic and red pepper flakes to pan and lower heat to medium-low and saute for 3-4 minutes until tender/ soft
Add wine and lemon juice and zest, continuing to mix, raise temp to medium-high and make sure to scrape up brown bits on bottom of pan
Once boiling, add tomatoes and mix occasionally for 3 minutes until sauce reduces
Once done reducing, add butter and melt (continuing to mix)
Once butter melts, add parsley and mix
Add cornstarch mixture slowly just enough to thicken the sauce
Add shrimp and mix and cover until ready to eat

ingredients.raw: About 1 pound (5 or 6/ person) jumbo shrimp (easy peel and deveined shrimp)

instructions.text: Defrost shrimp if frozen
If using zucchini, use spiralizer to make the shape of noodles
When shrimp is almost done defrosting, if making pasta, begin boiling water in a pot
Peel shrimp and place on paper towels on plate
Once water is boiling, pour pasta into pot and cook according to box directions
Add salt, pepper, and garlic powder to shrimp
Using a bigger bowl-shaped pan, spray olive oil to cover bottom of pan
Cook shrimp for a couple minutes on one side
When they turn pink around edges flip shrimp for another couple min or until pink
Take shrimp out of pan, put on a plate, and cover plate to keep shrimp warm
Pour sauce into shrimp pan to heat sauce
Add shrimp back into pan to keep warm
If using zucchini, spray bottom of smaller pan with olive oil
Pour zucchini noodles into smaller pan to heat up until they are sizzling
Serve shrimp and sauce with pasta or zucchini noodles

ingredients.raw: Massage in with hands if needed
Can check by poking a fork into the back of the squash, and if it goes right through, the squash is done

instructions.text: Preheat oven 400°F and line a baking sheet with tin foil
With a fork, poke holes all around the squash
Place squash in microwave for 1 minute to soften
Cut squash in half (either way works)
Scoop out the cavity of the squash
Drizzle olive oil in and around the cavity of the squash so it is completely coated
Season inside of squash with all of the seasonings
Lay squash on baking sheet face down (skin is facing up)
Place in oven for 40-50 minutes until squash is cooked
Remove from oven and let it cool
Once cool enough to handle, take a fork and and scrape the strands inside the squash into a bowl
Add your favorite sauce and protein and enjoy

ingredients.raw: 12 ounces spaghetti or other pasta of your choice
2 pints (about 20 ounces) sungold/ orange tomatoes, halved
When pasta is just about done, do NOT drain pasta water
Want pasta sauce to be a little loose because it will tighten up as it sits

instructions.text: In a large pot, begin to boil water for pasta
Heat olive oil in a dutch oven over low/ medium-low heat
Add shallots and cook until they begin to caramelize, about 8-10 minutes, stirring continuously to prevent burning
Add the thinly sliced garlic and cook for another 8 minutes
Add a pinch of red pepper flakes and the sliced tomatoes, then increase the heat to medium high
Cook for another 8-10 minutes, smushing the tomatoes to release their juices
Turn off the heat and transfer tomato mixture to a blender or to a measuring glass to use an immersion blender
Blend until completely smooth and add back to the pot
Add parmesan cheese, cold cubes of butter, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and basil to sauce, and mix until well combined
Once pasta water is boiling, sprinkle with salt, and add pasta, cooking until al dente
Using tongs, transfer the cooked pasta out of the boiling water directly into the simmering sauce and toss to coat
Ladle a spoonful or two of pasta water to pasta in sauce until sauce becomes glossy and emulsified
Serve and top with more fresh basil and parmesan cheese, if desired

recipes.title: Tortellini in a Creamy Tomato Sauce with Italian Sausage- 3 Servings

ingredients.raw: 1 teaspoon dried basil or 1 tablespoon fresh
1 cup heavy cream or half and half

instructions.text: Melt butter in a large pan over medium heat
Add olive oil and swirl around until combined
Add shallots and garlic and saute until softened and translucent, 2-3 minutes
Add ground sausage and cook until browned, about 8 minutes
Add cherry tomatoes and cook until they softened and start to burst
Add roasted red peppers, tomato paste, basil, Italian seasoning, salt, black pepper, and cook for 1 minute until thickened and combined
Add heavy cream and mix
Add parmesan cheese and spinach and cook until spinach has wilted
Add tortellini, combine, and serve

ingredients.raw: One 14 ½-ounce can whole peeled tomatoes

ingredients.note: Can substitute with 1/2 cup fat free half and half and 2 ounces cream cheese for a less rich sauce

ingredients.raw: 1/3 cup vodka, plus a splash more if desired for taste
1 ½ ounces grated Parmigiano-Reggiano, plus more for serving
1 pound pasta, such as rigatoni or penne
Optional protein: 1 ¼ pound shrimp or chicken
Can use an immersion blender if you use a deep bowl to prevent splattering
Can also reserve 2 cups pasta water, then drain pasta in a colander, then add 1/2 cup of reserved water to sauce
If sauce thickens too much before pasta is ready, add more pasta water in 1/4 cup increments as needed

If you can't detect the vodka at all, you can add a few drops more and stir it in before serving; exactly how boozy you want the sauce is a question of taste, but be careful because a heavy hand will ruin the dish

instructions.text: Dice onions and add to a bowl/ measuring cup with garlic and red pepper flakes
Pour can of whole peeled tomatoes with juices in a bowl/ measuring cup and by hand, crush each whole tomato into the bowl
In a large pot begin boiling water for the pasta and once boiling, lower temperature until ready to cook pasta
If serving with shrimp/ chicken, pour 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a sauce pan and melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium-high heat and saute protein with 1 minced garlic clove until cooked through
Remove meat from sauce pan and melt 3 more tablespoons butter in pan on medium heat
If using, add pancetta and cook for about 2 minutes, then remove and set aside
Add onions, garlic, and red pepper flakes, and cook with heat on medium-low, stirring occasionally, until onions are very soft but not browned, about 10 minutes
Add tomato paste and cook, stirring, until tomato paste is fragrant and thick, about 2 minutes
Stir in the peeled canned (and now crushed) tomatoes with their juice
Bring to a simmer, then lower temperature and continue cooking, stirring often until sauce has thickened slightly, about 10 minutes
Add heavy cream (or cream cheese then half and half) and stir to incorporate
For a smoother sauce, transfer sauce to a blender, and blend until very smooth
Return blended sauce to pan, add pancetta back to sauce, and season lightly with salt
Again, bring pot of water back to a boil, add salt and cook pasta until just shy of al dente, about 3 minutes less than the package directs
About 1 minute before you are done cooking pasta, add vodka to tomato sauce and bring to a gentle simmer over medium heat
Using a spider skimmer or slotted spoon, transfer pasta directly to sauce pot along with 1/2 cup pasta water
Increase heat to high, and cook pasta in sauce, stirring constantly, until pasta is well coated in sauce and reaches the al dente stage, about 3 minutes
Remove from heat and stir in cheese until thoroughly incorporated into a smooth and creamy sauce
Taste for salt, and season with more if needed
Serve with additional grated cheese, if desired

recipes.title: White Wine Garlic and Cream Sauce

ingredients.raw: 1/2 Teaspoon Kosher Salt, or to taste
1 Teaspoon Black Pepper, or to taste
1/2 Cup White Wine (I used Sauvignon Blanc)
1 Cup Parmesan Reggiano Cheese, fresh shredded

instructions.text: In a large cooking pan on medium heat, add in olive oil and butter
Once butter is melted add in onions and cook for about 2-3 minutes
Add in garlic and cook for another minute
Season with salt, black pepper, Italian Seasoning and mix in well
Add in White Wine and let simmer for about 2-3 minutes for the alcohol to cook out
Add in heavy cream, mix in well, and bring to a high simmer
Once heavy cream is at a high simmer, slightly turn down the heat so the sauce can be at a low simmer
Add in Pasta Water from cooked pasta and mix well
Let sauce simmer for about 5-7 minutes or until sauce thickens
Turn off heat and let sauce rest for about 2-3 minutes to continue to thicken as it cools
Add in parmesan cheese, parsley, and a small amount of Red Pepper Flakes, to taste
Mix in pasta with sauce and let rest for about 2-3 minutes so sauce can stick to pasta

ingredients.raw: 4 oz guanciale, chopped into fine matchsticks
1/4 cup freshly grated pecorino or Parmesan cheese, plus more for serving
1 28-ounce can whole peeled tomatoes, crushed by hand
ingredients.note: Can also use a blender to crush these or buy the already crushed tomatoes

ingredients.raw: Do this slowly to prevent eggs from scrambling
This will temper the eggs so they don't scramble in the sauce
The consistency should be slightly loose as it will tighten as it sits

instructions.text: Add guanciale to a large dutch oven with a splash of olive oil and begin to heat over medium low, cooking until the fat has rendered out and pork is golden brown, about 5-7 minutes
Turn off the heat and strain guancale, placing a bowl underneath the strainer to reserve as much pork fat as possible
Set reserved pork fat aside
Add 1 tablespoons of pork fat to the same pan and heat over medium-high
Break up the ground sausage into 2-3 inch pieces and sear in the pan until the outsides are golden brown and caramelized, then break up the ground meat into a fine mince
Transfer sausage into the same bowl as the guanciale and set aside
Return the same pan to medium-high heat and add the onion along with another tablespoon of the pork fat and a pinch of salt (but not too much because the pork and cheese are already very salty)
Scrape up any browned bits stuck to the pan as they cook
Once onions are soft and translucent, add the garlic and cook for another 60 seconds
Add the tomato paste and additional pork fat if needed and cook until tomato paste has caramelized and begins sticking to the bottom of the pan, about 2 minutes
Add the hand crushed tomatoes, sausage and guanciale into the pan
Mix to combine and bring to a gentle boil then reduce to a low simmer
If using, add a parmesan rind
Simmer, partially covered, for 30-45 minutes stirring every 5 minutes being sure to scrape the bottom of the pan so it does not scorch
When sauce is almost done simmering, begging to cook the pasta al dente in boiling salted water about 2 minutes shy of package directions
Remove the parm rind from the sauce and taste for seasoning
Use a slotted spoon to transfer pasta directly into the red sauce and save the pasta water
Simmer the pasta in the red sauce for about 2 minutes
To prepare the egg mixture, in a medium bowl combine egg yolks, cheese, and lots of fresh cracked black pepper, then whisk to combine
Gradually add about 1/4 cup of hot pasta water into the egg mixture, whisking continuously
Taste the pasta for doneness and simmer for longer if it's still undercooked, adding more pasta water as needed
Once the pasta is fully cooked, turn off the heat and immediately pour in the egg mixture
Toss to combine, adding more pasta water as needed
To serve, top with more pecorino and fresh cracked black pepper
Reduce pasta cooking time as it will continue to cook in the oven
Add extra pasta water to the combined pasta and sauce mixture as it will tighten up in the oven
Transfer to a baking dish and top with a thin layer of shredded mozzarella and pecorino cheese and bake at 375°F for 20-30 minutes
For an extra crispy top, broil after baking

ingredients.raw: Up to 1 ⅓ cups warm water (between 100-110°F)
ingredients.note: May not need to use it all because you don’t want the dough to be too wet

ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoons olive oil plus more as needed
1 ¾ cups (210g) bread flour plus more for hands and surface
If the dough is sticky, add additional flour, 1 tablespoon at a time, until the dough comes together in a solid ball
If the dough is too dry, add additional water, 1 tablespoon at a time
If not making 2 pizzas, freeze half of the dough for another time
You can bake the pizza on a baking sheet if you don’t have a stone

instructions.text: Combine the flour, sugar, yeast and kosher salt in the bowl of a stand mixer and combine
While the mixer is running, add the water and oil, slowly switching off between the two and knead about 4-5 minutes until the dough forms into a ball
Scrape the dough onto a lightly floured surface and gently knead into a smooth, firm ball
Grease large bowl with olive oil spray, add dough, cover bowl with plastic wrap and put it in a warm area to let it double in size, about 1 ½ hours or place in the fridge overnight
When the dough is ready, punch it down to release any air bubbles
Divide the dough in half
Preheat a pizza stone in the oven at 475ºF for at least 30 minutes
On a lightly floured work surface using lightly floured hands or rolling pin, gently flatten the dough into a disc
Using lightly floured hands, stretch and flatten the disc into a 12-inch circle
Lift edge of dough up to create a lip around the edges - pinch edges up to create the rim
If using a pizza stone, place the dough directly on a pizza peel dusted with cornmeal
Brush the top of the dough with olive oil (to prevent it from getting soggy from the toppings), then let it rest about 10-15 minutes
Put toppings on pizza and slide the pizza off the peel onto the stone in the oven
Bake pizza until the crust is browned and the cheese is golden, about 10-15 minutes

ingredients.raw: Pizza Crust (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
8 ounces boneless, skinless chicken breast, diced small

ingredients.note: Garlic powder Onion powder Paprika Salt

ingredients.raw: 4 slices bacon, cooked and diced small
Shredded cheese of your choice (mozzarella, cheddar, etc.)

instructions.text: Heat oven to 450°F convection
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium heat and cook onions for about 8 minutes until soft
In a small bowl, combine raw diced chicken and seasonings, including the pepper
In a pan, heat more olive oil over medium heat and cook chicken for 3-5 minutes until fully cooked
Spread sauce on pizza dough leaving a little space on the perimeter for a crust
Coat with shredded cheese
Top with chicken, followed by cooked bacon, and red onion
Drizzle with ranch
Place in oven and cook about 10-15 minutes until dough looks done and cheese is melted
Top with an additional drizzle of ranch, if desired

ingredients.raw: Pizza Crust (store bought or see recipe for homemade)

instructions.text: Heat oven to 450°F convection
Spread fig jam on pizza leaving a little space on the perimeter for a crust
Spread caramelized onions over jam
Sprinkle goat cheese over onions
Cook in oven for 10-12 minutes until cheese is melty
Remove from oven and layer pieces of prosciutto around pizza
Place figs on top of prosciutto so that each piece of pizza will get a fig
Drizzle balsamic glaze over pizza
Put back in oven and cook for about 3-5 minutes until its warm through and looks done
Sprinkle arugula over pizza and drizzle some more balsamic glaze
Serve immediately

ingredients.raw: Pizza Crust (store bought or see recipe for homemade)

instructions.text: Heat oven to 450°F convection
Spread sauce on pizza dough leaving a little space on the perimeter for a crust
Place mozzarella cheese around pizza
Layer torn pieces of basil around pizza
Place in oven and cook about 10-15 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly

ingredients.raw: Pizza Crust (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
8 ounces cooked chicken cut into bite sized pieces
Broccoli florets or baby spinach (or both)

instructions.text: Melt butter in a small saucepan medium heat
Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds, stirring frequently (don’t let it burn!)
Add in flour and whisk for 1-2 minutes
Slowly pour in milk stirring with a whisk until smooth and bubbles and thickens
Whisk in salt and black pepper
Add parmesan cheese and whisk another 30 seconds
Remove from heat and continue whisking just until cheese is melted and sauce is smooth then set aside to cool before using for pizza.
Heat oven to 450°F convection
Brush olive oil around crust
Spread sauce on pizza crust leaving a little edge
Layer on cheese, chicken and broccoli or spinach
Place in oven and cook about 10-15 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly

ingredients.raw: Pizza Crust (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
Pesto (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
8 ounces shrimp, shelled and deveined (if necessary)
ingredients.note: If using small sized shrimp (“large” or smaller, don’t need to cut) If using jumbo shrimp, may want to cut up into smaller pieces

instructions.text: Heat oven to 450°F convection
Spread pesto on pizza dough leaving a little space on the perimeter for a crust
Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese
Add shrimp, tomatoes, and onions to pizza
Place in oven and cook for about 10-15 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly and shrimp is cooked through
Once done, drizzle pizza with balsamic glaze

ingredients.raw: Pizza Crust (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
2 teaspoons chopped fresh parsley (or 1 teaspoon dried)
1/2 pound thinly sliced deli meats such as Italian cold cuts (salami, capicola, pepperoni, etc.)
1/4-1/3 pound (8-10 slices) sliced deli cheese (provolone, is good)
Optional: sprinkle of chopped fresh or dried parsley, sea salt, pepper, Italian seasoning, and/or parmesan cheese
You can cover shaped stromboli tightly and refrigerate for up to 8 hours
If you have an instant read thermometer, the center of the stromboli should be at least 200ºF

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 400°F, and line a baking sheet with parchment paper or silicone baking mats
On a lightly floured work surface using a lightly floured rolling pin, roll dough into a 10x16 inch rectangle
Mix melted butter and garlic together, then spread all over dough, and sprinkle with parsley
When you start layering on meats and cheeses, leave a 1/2 inch border on the bottom and sides and a 2 inch border on top
Arrange a layer of sliced meats onto the dough, usually about 8-10 slices on each depending on size and thickness of slices, then add a layer of cheese
Repeat with more meat and cheese until all is used
Brush all edges with egg wash, including at the top
Slowly roll each into a tight 16 inch log, folding in the two ends as you roll
Carefully transfer to a lined baking sheet
Pinch or tuck in ends to seal if they became unfolded
Brush stromboli with egg wash and, if desired, optional toppings
Using a very sharp knife, cut 3-4 slits into the top
Bake for about 25 minutes or until crust is golden brown
Remove from the oven and cool on baking sheets for 5 minutes before transferring to a cutting board and slicing
Serve plain or with pizza/ marinara sauce for dipping

ingredients.raw: 1 Bag of frozen riced cauliflower (10 or 12 ounces)
The more water you get out the better
Use saran wrap to help flatten into shape with your hands

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 425°F convection
Place a piece of parchment paper on a cookie sheet and spray it with non-stick spray
Place the cauliflower in a microwave safe bowl and microwave it for about 4 minutes
Pour it out on a clean kitchen towel or cheesecloth and wring the water out of it
Place in a bowl and mix in all of the other ingredients
Using your hands, take the mixture and make it into a ball
Place it on the parchment paper and flatten it out to a pizza shape
Place the cookie sheet in the oven and bake until the edges start to get golden brown and the middle sets - about 15 minutes
Flip over and bake for another few minutes
Remove from oven and let it cool for a few minutes

ingredients.raw: Keep an eye on the onions as they cook faster

instructions.text: To prepare tomatoes and onions, slice onions thin and cut tomatoes in half the long way and remove seeds
Line small baking sheet with tin foil
Lay tomatoes and onions across baking sheet and drizzle with honey, olive oil, and salt
Bake at 400°F convection or air fry at 400°F for about 15 minutes for onions and about 30 minutes for tomatoes until they look done
Cook burger as desired in the oven, on the stove, or on the grill
When just about done, top with a slice of mozzarella cheese
Toast burger bun if desired
Build burger by topping with roasted tomatoes and onions, and basil aioli, and enjoy!

recipes.title: Surprise Burgers
notes: Can easily half recipe*
Can make the burgers smaller to make up to 25 and use 1/4 cup of filling instead

instructions.text: To make the dough, sift flour, salt, and sugar together
Dissolve yeast in warm water
Add yeast water to flour mixture, then add oil and mix well
Cover dough and let it rise for 1 hour
To prepare the meat filling, heat a tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat
Add meat, onion, mushrooms, garlic, and seasonings and cook until browned
Drain the fat from the meat mixture
Add flour and stir until meat sticks together
Cool meat slightly, then add grated cheese and mix until well blended
Once the dough has doubled in size, punch down the dough to release any air bubbles
Remove dough from the bowl and turn it out onto a lightly floured surface, then punch down again to release any more air bubbles if needed
Cut dough into 12 even pieces and form each into a large ball
Roll out a piece of dough and flatten in a circle
Lay any toppings flat in center dough
Put approximately 1/2 cup of meat filling in the center
Pull dough around the meat to make a roll and pinch tightly to close seams
Place seam side down on cookie sheet
Brush with egg wash and let it rise 15-30 minutes
Bake at 375°F until light brown, about (10-15 min)

ingredients.raw: You should have about 2 tablespoons of grated onion - don’t use the extra juice

instructions.text: Grate the onion on the fine holds of the grater
In a bowl combine all of the ingredients and mix together with a fork
Shape the meat into four 5 ounce 1/2 inch thick patties
Place in freezer for about 15 minutes prior to cooking
Cook in one of three ways (internal temp should be 165°F):
Butter one side of each slice of bread
Heat frying pan/ griddle to medium/ 300°F
Place buttered sides of bread down on pan
Spread pesto on the other side of one piece of bread
Drizzle balsamic glaze on the other side of the other piece of bread
Layer cheese on one piece of bread and meat on the other piece
Add tomatoes and onions on top of the meat
Add basil on top of the cheese
Drizzle more balsamic glaze over the basil
After 2-3 minutes check to see if outsides of bread are browning
Carefully fold the two slices of bread together
Continue to cook until cheese is melted, flipping sandwich occasionally to prevent burning

ingredients.raw: 4 medium-sized taco shells (Mission Carb Balance Soft Taco flour tortillas)
3/4 cup Shredded cheese of your cheese (Cheddar, Mexican style, etc.)

ingredients.note: 1/2 teaspoon ground mustard 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder 1/2 teaspoon onion powder 1/2 teaspoon Cumin 1/2 teaspoon paprika 1/4 teaspoon Kosher Salt 1/4 teaspoon Black Pepper

1/3 cup (75g) nonfat Greek yogurt 2 tablespoons + 2 teaspoons (45g) ketchup 4 teaspoons (20g) honey mustard 1/2 large Dill pickle (35g), diced small 1/8 teaspoon garlic powder 1/4 teaspoon Kosher Salt 1/8 teaspoon Black Pepper

ingredients.raw: Be careful not to burn the tortilla!
This will prevent them from falling apart/ unwrapping

instructions.text: Prepare the sauce by combining all ingredients together and mixing until well combined, then set aside
Heat a large pan to medium heat
Add diced mushrooms and begin sauteing for 3-4 minutes until they soften and start to release their juices
Add diced onions to pan with mushrooms, seasoning with a little bit of salt and pepper to help vegetables release their juices
Continue cooking mushrooms and onions for about 2 more minutes just until the onions begin to soften, then remove vegetables to a bowl and set aside
Add ground beef and cook for 5-6 minutes, until almost fully cooked
Once almost browned, add the burger seasoning mixture to the pan and mix to combine, cooking for another 2 minutes until fully cooked
Once cooked, remove ground beef to a bowl and set aside
To assemble: In the center of the tortilla, add about 1 ½ tablespoons burger sauce, followed by ground beef, shredded cheese, mushrooms/ onions, and lettuce
Fold in both sides of the tortilla and then roll as if you are rolling a burrito, making sure to push the toppings into the center as you’re rolling
Repeat assembly steps with remaining tortillas
Heat a large pan to medium high heat and add a little bit of oil
Place wraps, crease-side-down onto the pan, and cook for about 3 minutes until the crease stays closed and the wrap is crispy and warm
Rotate wrap to other side to slightly brown it
Optional: Once wraps are cooked, wrap each in tin foil
Cut each wrap in half at a slight diagonal
Serve with remaining burger sauce and enjoy!

ingredients.raw: Half a red bell pepper, thinly sliced
Half a large yellow onion, thinly sliced
Iceberg lettuce, thinly sliced and soaked in ice water
1/2 tablespoon from adobo (from can of chipotle peppers in adobo sauce)

instructions.text: Combine all sauce ingredients in a bowl and set aside
Heat a tablespoon of avocado or olive oil on a large pan over medium heat
Add onions, red peppers, salt, and pepper, and cook for 3-4 minutes until softened
Add minced garlic and cook for another 1-2 minutes until veggies start to char
Slice ciabatta and toast at 350°F for 5 minutes until crispy
Add another tablespoon of avocado or olive oil to pan and add shaved steak to the pan
Season steak with salt, pepper, and drizzle over 2 ½ tablespoons of worcestershire sauce
Cook steak for about 5 minutes until browned
Once steak is cooked, drain any excess grease from pan and separate steak into separate piles in pan
Sprinkle shredded cheese over steak, cover pan, and cook on low for 2-3 minutes until cheese melts
To assemble sandwich: spread a layer of sauce to one side of the sandwich, then top with lettuce, followed by steak, and peppers and onions
Ingredients
In the bowl of a food processor, add the chickpeas, parsley, cilantro, garlic, shallot, flour, sesame seeds, cumin, paprika, lemon, and salt
Pulse until mixture comes together in a rough paste
Shape the falafel mixture into tablespoon-sized discs, about 1-inch in diameter (use a cookie scooper)
Repeat until you use all the falafel mixture
Spray the basket for your air fryer with some nonstick olive oil
Add as many falafel discs into the basket as you can without them touching and spray them with olive oil very lightly
Air fry the falafel at 350°F for 8 minutes
Flip and fry for another 6 minutes on the second side
Repeat until you've cooked all the falafel

ingredients.raw: Cheese (best kind may depend on type of sandwich)
One of the following desired add-ins:
ingredients.note: Tomato and bacon with American cheese Caramelized onions with Gruyere cheese Pulled chicken (2-3 ounces) with gouda cheese Cheddar, Apple, Brie and fig jam

instructions.text: Butter one side of each slice of bread
Heat frying pan/ griddle to medium
Place buttered sides of bread down on pan
Layer cheese and other toppings evenly on both slices of bread
After 2-3 minutes check to see if outsides of bread are browning
Carefully fold the two slices of bread together
Continue to cook until cheese is melted, flipping sandwich occasionally to prevent burning

ingredients.raw: 2 types of deli meat, such as pastrami turkey
Sesame seeds or “Everything but the Bagel” spice

instructions.text: Preheat oven 350°F convection and lightly grease a 12x15 inch baking sheet with non-stick cooking spray
Unfold the puff pastry onto the prepared baking sheet
Spread mustard over pastry and sprinkle brown sugar on top
Lay one layer of each meat then cheese down, one layer on top of the other
Jelly roll the dough (like a burrito) and lay the seam side down
Crack and beat the egg and brush it onto the top of the knish
Sprinkle with sesame seed or everything bagel spice
Bak, uncovered for 45 minutes to 1 hour, until lightly browned and flaking
Let it cool for 5 minutes before slicing and then serve

ingredients.raw: Sandwich rolls or biscuits (store bought or see recipe for homemade biscuits)

ingredients.note: Tomato Pickles
Ketchup Chick-fil-A sauce (see recipe)

ingredients.raw: If making biscuits, leave room on the pan to cook biscuits while chicken is cooking

instructions.text: Prepare chicken by cutting it in half horizontally to thin it
Marinade chicken using oven fried chicken recipe
If making your own biscuits, prepare the biscuits while chicken is marinating, but don’t cook them
Once chicken is done marinating, make and cook the chicken
Remove biscuits from oven after 10-15 minutes, when fully cooked, and continue cooking chicken until it’s done
If using sandwich rolls, toast rolls when chicken is almost done cooking
Serve with your choice of toppings

ingredients.raw: 1green or red bell pepper sliced thin
1 ¼ pounds boneless ribeye steaks thinly sliced against the grain or shaved beef steak, rough chopped into smallER pieces
You can scoop out some of the inside of the roll to add room for the cheesesteak

instructions.text: Preheat skillet over medium heat
Butter insides of hoagie rolls with 1 tablespoon of butter
Place hoagie rolls face down (one at a time) onto skillet until lightly browned and toasty, then set aside
Add 1 tablespoon of butter to skillet and melt
Add bell pepper, onions, and mushrooms to skillet and season with salt and pepper
Cook, stirring occasionally, until veggies are lightly browned and onions turn translucent
Remove from pan and set aside
Add 1 tablespoon of butter to skillet and melt
Season the steak with salt and pepper
Add steak to skillet and cook for 2-4 minutes, stirring occasionally
Add worcestershire sauce to skillet and stir to combine
Reduce heat to low and return veggies to skillet and stir to combine
Divide into 4 even portions on the skillet and top each with 2 slices of cheese and turn off the heat so the cheese will melt without overcooking the meat
Working with one portion at a time, place a toasted bun over each portion and use a spatula to scrape the cheesy beef into your bun as you flip it over

ingredients.raw: 2 slices rustic Italian or sourdough bread

instructions.text: Butter one side of each slice of bread
Heat frying pan/ griddle to medium/ 300°F
Place buttered sides of bread down on pan
Spread pesto on each slice of bread
Lay cheese on each piece of bread, followed by prosciutto
Add avocado on one piece of bread
Add tomatoes and onion on the other piece of bread
After 2-3 minutes check to see if outsides of bread are browning
Once cheese begins to melt and the bread starts to brown, carefully fold the slice of bread with the cheese onto the other slice
Continue to cook until cheese is melted, flipping sandwich occasionally to prevent burning

ingredients.raw: 2 slices pumpernickel or rye bread buttered on one side
6 slices of corned beef or pastrami (store bought or see recipe for homemade pastrami)
1 slice Swiss cheese, Emmentaler, or Jarlsberg

instructions.text: Heat electric griddle to 350°F or heat a griddle pan over medium heat
Drain the sauerkraut and warm in microwave
Place the buttered side of the bread down on the griddle
Spread the dressing on the inside of each piece of bread
On one piece of bread layer the meat
On the other piece of bread layer the cheese and sauerkraut
Cook until the bottom of the bread just starts to turn golden brown and the cheese starts to melt
Carefully fold the two sides together and press down
Continue cooking for another minute or so and carefully flip
Remove from the griddle, cut in half and serve

ingredients.raw: 2 ounces turkey (or more if for dinner)

instructions.text: Butter one side of each slice of bread
Heat frying pan/ griddle to medium/ 300°F
Place buttered sides of bread down on pan
Spread mayonnaise on each slice of bread
Lay cheese on one piece of bread and turkey on the other piece of bread
Add tomatoes and onions on top of the meat
Add bacon on top of the cheese followed by avocado
After 2-3 minutes check to see if outsides of bread are browning
Once cheese begins to melt and the bread starts to brown, add arugula on top of the tomato and onion
Carefully fold the slice of bread with the cheese onto the other slice
Continue to cook until cheese is melted, flipping sandwich occasionally to prevent burning

ingredients.raw: 4 tablespoons Ah-So sauce (optional for red color - if leaving out add 2 tablespoons brown sugar and 2 additional tablespoons hoisin sauce)
Keep your eye on it as it can burn easily if the heat is too high
Depending on the size of the pan, you may have to work in batches
Let them get a charred a bit

instructions.text: Cut ribs into thin strips and place into a ziploc bag
Combine the rest of the ingredients to make the marinade, reserve half and add the rest to the bag with the ribs
Marinate at least overnight or up to 2 days
Strain porkstrips and pat dry
Pour reserved marinade into a sauce pan and bring to a boil
Reduce heat and allow to simmer for about a minute about 5 minutes until the sauce has thickened
Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly
Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large frying pan on high heat for about a minute
As soon as the oil begins to smoke, lay the pork strips in the pan
Let the pork cook undisturbed for about 2-3 minutes until you have a good sear
Once seared well on one side, turn the pieces over and cook until well seared on the second side and cooked through
Pour the reserved marinade into the pan and saute for another minute or 2 until the glaze is thick and sticky

ingredients.raw: 1 ¼ pounds chicken breast cut into bite sized pieces
Variety of vegetables of your choice diced into large pieces:
ingredients.note: 1 medium onion 8 mushrooms 1/2 cup broccoli 1/2 green pepper 1/2 red pepper 1/2 cup fresh sugar snap peas

ingredients.raw: 1 cup of favorite teriyaki sauce/marinade, divided

instructions.text: Ingredients
Put chicken into a large ziploc bag and pour about 1/3 cup of the teriyaki sauce into bag and make sure all the chicken pieces are covered
Place in refrigerator and let sit for at least an hour to overnight
Prepare rice by adding in 1 teaspoon of ginger and 1 minced garlic clove before cooking
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium high heat
Add chicken to skillet and let it brown on one side for about 3 minutes, then turn over, lower heat to medium and let cook another 3-5 minutes until done
Remove chicken from skillet and set aside and cover to keep warm, wipe out skillet
Add 1 tablespoon of canola oil and add onions, mushrooms and snap peas to pan
Saute for about 3 minutes until onions begin to soften and add in 1 teaspoon of ginger and 1 minced garlic clove
Saute for another 1-2 minutes
Add 1/3 cup of teriyaki sauce to pan and saute for another minute
Add broccoli, peppers and edamame to pan and saute for about 3 minutes until everything is coated and beginning to soften but is still crunchy
Divide rice into 4 bowls, then top with veggies divided among the four bowls and then the chicken
Sprinkle with scallions and serve with remaining teriyaki on the side or yum yum sauce

ingredients.raw: 1 pound ground chicken breast (can use turkey breast if necessary)
1 tablespoon rice wine vinegar (sugar free, sodium free)
1 (8-ounce) can whole water chestnuts, drained and diced

instructions.text: Combine hoisin sauce, oyster sauce, soy sauce, rice wine vinegar, sesame oil and Sriracha (if using) in a bowl and set aside
Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium high heat until shimmering
Add ground chicken
Season with salt and pepper and cook for 3-5 minutes, until browned, making sure to crumble the chicken as it cooks with a spatula
Add mushrooms, pepper and onion to the pan and cook for 4-5 minutes or until soft
Stir in garlic and ginger and mix for 1 minute
Stir in the sauce for about 1-2 minutes
Stir in chestnuts for about 1-2 minutes or until soft
Season with salt and pepper
Add in green onions
To serve, spoon several tablespoons of the chicken mixture into the center of a lettuce leaf, taco-style

ingredients.raw: 1 teaspoon Thai red chili paste - more or less depending on spice level
Variety of vegetables of your choice diced into large pieces:
ingredients.note: 1 medium onion 3 oz shiitake mushrooms 1/2 bell pepper 1/2 cup fresh sugar snap peas

ingredients.raw: 8 ounces chicken thighs , cut into bite size pieces (breast ok too)
1 cup fresh Thai Holy Basil leaves (or substitute regular basil) , roughly chopped

instructions.text: Cook noodles according to package instructions
Mix sauce in a small bowl and set aside
Heat 1 tablespoon of canola oil in wok or large skillet over high heat
Add onion and mushrooms and cook for 5 minutes
Add garlic and ginger and cook for another minute
Transfer to a bowl and set aside
Add another tablespoon of oil to the pan
Add chicken and season with pepper
Cook about 3 minutes on each side until browned
Add the onions, mushrooms, bell pepper, half the scallions and any other vegetables and cook for 2 minutes
Push everything to one side of the pan and add the sesame oil
Then add the noodles to the pan saute with the chicken and vegetables
Pour the sauce over the noodles and toss and cook for a few minutes until warmed through
Remove from heat and stir in chopped basil

ingredients.raw: 1 cup Brown Jasmine rice, rinsed well and drained
2 tablespoons plus 1 teaspoon low sodium soy sauce
6 ounces pork, chicken, or shrimp, diced (optional)

ingredients.note: NOTE: Do NOT skip this step If time permits, line a baking sheet with parchment paper, spread rice onto sheet and refrigerate for at least an 1 hour to overnight

instructions.text: If cooking rice without Instant pot or Pressure cooker, cook rice according to package directions
If cooking rice using an Instant Pot or Pressure Cooker:
Whisk together eggs and add pepper
Spray large skillet with cooking spray and cook eggs in flat open omelet style
Remove from pan and dice, and add to a new bowl
Cook and chop bacon and add to bowl with eggs
If using chicken or pork, heat large pan with 1 tablespoon of olive/ canola oil, add chicken and/ or pork and saute until cooked through
Once cooked, transfer meat to bowl with eggs and bacon
Heat sesame oil over medium high heat in large pan (can be same pan used for meat)
Add the onion and mushrooms and saute for about 3-5 minutes
Add garlic and ginger and saute for about 1 minute
If using shrimp, add shrimp and cook until pink
Add the peas and carrots
Add the butter and cook together for about another 2 minutes
Add rice with veggies, raise heat to medium high, and cook for another 2-3 minutes
Mix in the eggs, bacon, other meat, if using, and scallions, and stir
Add the soy sauce and oyster sauce and stir until combined
If using, shake in a generous amount of sesame seeds and mix everything together

ingredients.raw: 1 pound skinless, boneless chicken breasts or thighs

ingredients.note: Can substitute with dry sherry

ingredients.raw: 3 tablespoons Chinese rice vinegar or distilled white vinegar
4 ½ tablespoons homemade or store-bought low-sodium chicken stock
1 ½ teaspoon roasted sesame seed oil
3 teaspoons peanut, vegetable, or canola oil
3 teaspoons (about 2 scallions) minced plus 7 scallions, cut into 1-inch lengths, white-to-light green parts only for both, separated
2 small dried red chiles or up to 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes
ingredients.note: Original recipe calls for 8 chiles, but we used 3 at first and still found it very spicy, so it may depend on the type of chiles you get

instructions.text: Cut chicken into 1-inch pieces
In a bowl, beat egg white until light and foamy
Combine the rest of marinade ingredients with egg white and marinade chicken for about 30 minutes-1 hour
Preheat oven to 425°F convection

While chicken is marinating, make the sauce by combining soy sauce, wine, vinegar, chicken stock, sugar, sesame seed oil, and cornstarch in a small bowl and stir with a fork until cornstarch is dissolved and no lumps remain, then set aside
In a large skillet over medium heat, combine oil, garlic, ginger, minced scallions, and red chilies and cook, stirring, until vegetables are aromatic and soft, but not browned, about 3 minutes
Stir sauce mixture and add to skillet, making sure to scrape out any sugar or starch that has sunk to the bottom
Cook sauce, stirring, until it boils and thickens, about 1 minute
Add scallion segments, then transfer sauce to a bowl to stop cooking
When chicken is ready, line a baking sheet with tin foil
Combine flour and panko in a bowl
A few pieces at a time, remove chicken from the marinade, dredge in breading mixture and spread out on baking sheet
Bake for 10 minutes, flip pieces and continue baking for another 10 minutes until chicken is cooked and lightly golden brown
When chicken is done cooking, add sauce to a large skillet and reheat
Once sauce is warm, add chicken to skillet and toss with sauce until fully coated
Serve with rice and steamed broccoli

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ pounds boneless chicken, cut into 3/4-inch chunks
2 tablespoons homemade or store-bought low-sodium chicken stock
2 tablespoons vegetable, peanut, or canola oil
2 large peppers (red and orange), cut into 3/4-inch dice
4 ounces sliced shiitake mushrooms (can be bought in a container, sliced)
2 teaspoons minced fresh garlic (about 2 medium cloves)
1 scallion, white and light green parts only, finely minced
1/4 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes (or less)

instructions.text: For the Chicken: Combine chicken bits, salt, pepper, soy sauce, wine, sugar, sesame oil, and cornstarch in a medium bowl and toss to coat, then set aside for 20 minutes
For the Stir-Fry: Combine soy sauce, wine, vinegar, chicken stock, sugar, sesame oil, and cornstarch in a small bowl and whisk together until homogenous, then set aside
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a skillet over high heat until smoking
Add chicken, spread into a single layer, and let sit until lightly browned, about 1 minute
Continue cooking, stirring frequently for 2-3 minutes
Transfer to a clean bowl and set aside
Heat remaining tablespoon of oil over high heat until smoking, about 1 minute
Add onion and mushrooms stirring occasionally for about 4 minutes
Add bell peppers and peas stirring occasionally for about 1 minute until brightly colored and browned
Add peanuts and mix ingredients in pan
Push vegetables around sides of skillet to clear a space in the center
Add garlic, ginger, scallions, and red pepper flakes in middle and stir until fragrant, about 30 seconds
Return chicken to skillet and stir everything together
Stir sauce and add to skillet, mixing until sauce thickens and coats ingredients and chicken is cooked through for about 1 minute

ingredients.raw: 1 pound chicken or beef cut into bite sized pieces or any other protein of your choice
Other vegetables of choice (snap peas, edamame, etc.)

instructions.text: For the Chicken: Combine chicken bits, salt, pepper, soy sauce, wine, sugar, sesame oil, and cornstarch in a medium bowl and toss to coat, then set aside for 20 minutes
For the sauce: Stir together the chicken stock, oyster sauce, soy sauce, hoisin sauce, cornstarch and sesame oil, then set aside
Heat up a pot of water and cook the dry Lo Mein noodles per the package instructions
After the noodles are done, rinse with cold water to remove the starchy contents on the noodles, then drain and set aside
Heat 1 tablespoon of the vegetable oil in a wok or large pan over medium-high heat
Add the chicken and cook until no longer pink inside, 3-4 minutes, then remove the chicken from the pan and set aside
If using shrimp also, once chicken is done cooking add shrimp in with it to cook until pink
Heat the other tablespoon of oil in the pan, add the garlic and ginger and cook until fragrant
Add the mushrooms and onions and stir fry for about 3 minutes
Add the rest of the vegetables and stir fry until tender
Return the cooked chicken to the pan and add the cooked noodles and reserved sauce
Cook for 3 minutes, until everything is well-coated in the sauce and the sauce starts to thicken

ingredients.raw: 1 pound beef ﬂank steak, sliced against the grain into ¼-inch-thick slices
¾ cup hot water (or beef or chicken stock)
1-inch piece ginger, peeled and thinly sliced (or 2 cubes frozen minced ginger)
1 tablespoon cornstarch (mixed with 1 tablespoon water to make a slurry)
1 red bell pepper, cut into large dice, or a small head of broccoli
1/2 medium onion, cut into large dice
This may take a little time so be patient

instructions.text: For the beef: Slice the steak against the grain into 1/4-inch thick slices
In a medium bowl, combine the beef with the oil, Shaoxing wine (or dry sherry), regular soy sauce, cornstarch, water, and baking soda, then marinate for 1 hour
For the sauce: In a small bowl, mix brown sugar and hot water (or low sodium chicken or beef stock) until the sugar is dissolved
Mix in soy sauces
Put garlic and ginger in a small bowl and set aside
For the stir-fry: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil to medium high in a wok or medium saute pan
Stir in the bell peppers or broccoli, and onions and let them cook until they begin to soften, about 3-4 minutes
Add in the garlic and cook for another minute the edges of the veggies begin to brown
Transfer to a bowl and cover to keep warm
Add the rest of the oil to the skillet over high heat until just before it starts to smoke
Working in batches so as not to crowd the pan, spread the beef slices evenly in the pan and saute for about 3-5 minutes until fully cooked
Add the sesame oil to the skillet and turn the heat to medium-high
Add the ginger and the garlic and stir for 20 seconds
Add the premixed sauce and simmer for 2 minutes
Slowly stir in the cornstarch slurry mixture, bring sauce to a boil, then reduce to a simmer, and cook until the sauce has thickened enough to coat the back of a spoon, at least 5 minutes
Add the beef, veggies, and scallions and toss everything together for another 30 seconds
There should be almost no liquid, as the sauce should be clinging to the beef
Serve with white rice and enjoy

ingredients.raw: 2 ½ pounds skinless, boneless chicken breasts or thighs
1 ½ cups fresh squeezed orange juice
ingredients.note: If you don’t have enough oranges for the whole measurement, you can also use orange juice from a carton for some of or the entire measurement

ingredients.raw: Thinly sliced green onion for garnish

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 425°F convection and spray one large baking sheet with cooking spray or line with parchment paper
In a measuring cup squeeze out/ pour orange juice, including the pulp
Take 2 tablespoons of strained orange juice and pour into a separate measuring cup (leave pulp in with rest of orange juice), and set aside
In the cup with the majority of the juice, whisk together orange zest, soy sauce, brown sugar, mirin, sriracha, sesame oil, garlic and ginger
Season chicken on both sides with salt and pepper and cut chicken into 1-inch pieces
Place well beaten eggs into a pie plate
Combine Panko and flour in another pie plate, mixing well
Dip each piece of chicken into the egg mixture, then into the crumb mixture
Place on baking sheet so they do not touch
Bake for 10 minutes, flip pieces using tongs and continue baking for another 10 minutes until chicken is cooked and lightly golden brown
Place orange sauce in a pan and cook over high heat, bringing to a boil
Once boiling, stir and reduce heat to low, cooking for another 15 minutes
Combine reserved orange juice (2 tablespoons) and cornstarch in a small bowl, stirring until smooth
Stir into the sauce and cook for about 2 minutes until thickened
Remove from heat to a large bowl
