Place chicken in a bowl, pour sauce over, and gently toss chicken with the sauce until well coated
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and sliced green onion and serve over cooked rice with broccoli

ingredients.raw: 3-4 cups (8 ounces) medium-width rice sticks (linguine), soaked
12 ounces chicken, cut into thin strips, 1-inch lengths
1 ½ tablespoons packaged shredded sweetened radish, rinsed
3-4 green onions, cut into 2-inch bias strips
If the skillet seems dry, add a small amount of the noodle soaking water

instructions.text: For the Pad Thai Sauce: In a small bowl, stir together all the ingredients, then set aside
For the Pad Thai: Soak the noodles in enough warm water to cover for 30 minutes-1 hour
Heat a large cast-iron skillet over high heat, add the oil and coat the skillet completely
When the skillet starts to smoke, add the shallots, mushrooms and garlic and cook, stirring, for 5 seconds
Add the tofu and dried shrimp and cook, stirring, until they begin to soften, about 3-4 minutes
Add the chicken pieces and cook, stirring, until no longer pink, 1-2 minutes
Push ingredients in the skillet to one side and let the oil settle in the center of skillet
Crack the eggs into the oil and let set until half-cooked, about 30 seconds, then lightly scramble
Combine with the remaining cooked ingredients in the skillet, scraping the bits from the bottom before they burn
Add the drained noodles and cook, stirring, until softened, 2-3 minutes
Add the radish and shrimp and cook until both the chicken and shrimp are at medium doneness, about 1 minute
Add the sauce and fold together until all the liquid is absorbed, about 2 minutes
Place half of the bean sprouts, half of the crushed peanuts and the garlic chives (or scallions) in the center of noodles, and then spoon some noodles over them to cover and let steam for 30 seconds
Transfer to a serving plate, and garnish with the remaining bean sprouts, peanuts and lime

recipes.title: Salmon Rice Bowl
notes: If doubling recipe, don’t need to double marinade but might want to double the honey glaze and rest of bowl fillings*

ingredients.raw: 1 pound salmon, skinned, cut into bite-size pieces
3 tablespoon Japanese mayo (or 3 tablespoons regular mayo mixed with ¾ teaspoon rice vinegar and ⅛ teaspoon sugar)
Cornstarch slurry: 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 tablespoons cold water
2 servings white or brown rice, rinsed

instructions.text: Marinate the salmon with honey, ginger, soy sauce, oyster sauce, Japanese mayo, salt, and pepper for 20 minutes
While salmon is marinating, cut all vegetables and set aside
Once salmon is done marinating, start by first boiling water and cooking rice according to package directions, adding ginger and garlic to rice while it cooks
While rice is cooking, prepare vegetables by heating Canola oil in a medium-sized pan and cooking mushrooms and onions for about 3 minutes until they begin to soften
Add ginger and garlic and cook for another 2 minutes
Add broccoli, soy sauce, and hoisin sauce and cook for another 3 minutes, then turn off heat and cover pan with lid until ready to serve
Air Fry salmon at 380°F for 10 minutes, flipping halfway through
When rice is done, add soy sauce, oyster sauce, hoisin sauce, and sesame oil to rice and mix to combine
Just before ready to eat, make the honey glaze sauce by adding soy sauce, honey, ginger, and water to a pot
Bring it to a simmer on medium-high heat for 2-3 minutes or until bubbly, whisking occasionally
Add cornstarch slurry to thicken, whisk, and simmer for another minute
Build bowl by adding rice, vegetables, avocado, asian-marinated cucumbers, and salmon to a bowl
Drizzle the sauce over the salmon and vegetables, and garnish with sesame seeds

ingredients.raw: 2 ½ pounds skinless, boneless chicken breasts or thighs
4 tablespoons Shaoxing wine or dry sherry
1/2 cup plus 1 tablespoon dark soy sauce
1/3 cup plus 1 tablespoon Shaoxing wine or dry sherry
1/3 cup plus 1 tablespoon tablespoons Chinese rice vinegar or distilled white vinegar

ingredientGroups.name: 1/2 cup plus 1 tablespoon homemade or store-bought low-sodium chicken stock

instructionGroups.name: 1/2 cup plus 1 tablespoon homemade or store-bought low-sodium chicken stock

instructions.text: Cut chicken into 1-inch pieces
In a bowl, beat egg white until light and foamy
Combine the rest of marinade ingredients with egg white and marinade chicken for about 30 minutes-1 hour
Preheat oven to 425°F convection

While chicken is marinating, make the sauce by combining soy sauce, wine, vinegar, chicken stock, sugar, sesame seed oil, and cornstarch in a small bowl and stir with a fork until cornstarch is dissolved and no lumps remain, then set aside
When chicken is ready, line a baking sheet with tin foil
Combine flour and panko in a bowl
A few pieces at a time, remove chicken from the marinade, dredge in breading mixture and spread out on baking sheet
Bake for 10 minutes, flip pieces and continue baking for another 10 minutes until chicken is cooked and lightly golden brown

While chicken is baking, in a large skillet over medium heat, combine oil, garlic, ginger and minced scallions and cook, stirring, until vegetables are aromatic and soft, but not browned, about 3 minutes
Stir sauce mixture and add to skillet, making sure to scrape out any sugar or starch that has sunk to the bottom
Cook sauce, stirring, until it boils and thickens, about 1 minute
Add half the sesame seeds and scallion segments, then transfer sauce to a bowl to stop cooking
Add chicken to empty skillet and return sauce to skillet.
Once sauce is warm, add chicken to skillet and toss with sauce until fully coated and sprinkle with remaining sesame seeds
Serve with rice and steamed broccoli

ingredients.raw: 1-1 ¼ pound of skirt or flank steak or chicken, or 4-6 ounces shrimp per person
1 cup of dry rice (white or brown plain rice or see recipe to make fried rice) or 8 ounces of dry noodles (lo mein or rice noodles)

ingredients.note: 1 large yellow onion 4-5 ounces of broccoli florets 5 ounces mushrooms, sliced, preferable shiitake mushrooms 1 peppers (red, yellow, or orange) 1/2 can of pineapple tidbits or 1 small can of mandarin oranges

ingredients.raw: Want to do this towards the end so they don’t get soft or overcooked

instructions.text: If making homemade fried rice, cook the plain rice the night before (or at least 1 hour before) and refrigerate - see recipe for more details
Combine all the sauce ingredients in a small pot, and stir well
Heat up the sauce on medium heat, until slightly thickened, stirring occasionally
Remove sauce from heat, pour into measuring cup, and set aside
Prep all vegetables by chopping them fairly large for stir fry and small for fried rice (if using) and place in bowls
Shell shrimp, if using, and cut all meat into bite-sized pieces for stir fry and smaller pieces for fried rice, if using
If making homemade fried rice, follow the rest of the steps to make rice before moving on with the stir fry, then keep rice warm in a 200°F oven
If making plain rice or noodles, get those in the pot before you move on to the stir fry, then begin making the stir fry as the rice/ noodles are cooking
To prepare stir fry, pour a thin layer of canola oil on a large pan and bring to high heat
Cook the meat, adding 1 minced garlic clove and 1 teaspoon of ginger halfway through cook time, then set aside
After meat is set aside cook onions and mushrooms in same skillet for 3-4 minutes until soft
Add in garlic and ginger
Add broccoli, peppers, and chicken to pan and cook for a few minutes until broccoli turns to a brighter green
If using, add pineapple or oranges to pan
With pan on medium, add the sauce and mix all together until well combined
If serving with noodles, add the cooked noodles to the pan with the stir fry to help them absorb the sauce; if using rice, serve it separately
Turn heat on low until ready to serve
Serve on top of/ with rice or noodles

ingredients.raw: 25cm extra thin summer/ spring roll rice wrapper
Handful rice noodles (preferably angel hair thin but could also use thick)
Peanut dipping sauce (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
ingredients.note: It’s okay if the wrapper is still stiff - it will soften while you are building the roll

instructions.text: Prep vegetables by cutting carrots and cucumbers into thin strips and slicing the avocado
Cut a piece of lettuce about the size of your palm
Bring pot of water to boil and boil shrimp for 2 minutes, then transfer to ice bath to cool
In the same pot, add rice noodles and boil according to instructions or until fully cooked
Once shrimp have cooled down, slice each shrimp in half so you have two thinner shrimp
Prepare peanut dipping sauce, then set aside
To build the summer roll:
Repeat for however many summer rolls you are making
Serve with dipping sauce and enjoy!

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ pounds boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs cut into strips
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
12 ounces Shredded Vegetable of Choice (broccoli slaw, snap peas, peppers, etc)
6 fluid ounces Sesame Ginger Vinaigrette (see recipe)
While marinating make all the sauces/ fillings

instructions.text: In a medium bowl, combine coconut milk, soy sauce, curry powder, turmeric, garlic, ginger, brown sugar and fish sauce
In a gallon size Ziploc bag or large bowl, combine chicken and coconut milk mixture; marinate for at least 2 hours to overnight, turning the bag occasionally
Drain the chicken from the marinade, discarding the marinade
Preheat the grill to medium high heat and thread chicken onto skewers
Add skewers to grill, and cook, turning occasionally, until the chicken is completely cooked through, reaching an internal temperature of 165°F, about 12-15 minutes
Make the sesame ginger dressing and mix some with the shredded vegetables
Make the peanut sauce, Asian-marinated cucumbers, and sesame noodles
Place chicken and vegetables mixture in lettuce cups, serve with cucumbers, peanuts, peanut sauce, noodles, and extra dressing on the side

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ pounds boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs cut into strips
12 ounces Shredded Vegetable of Choice (broccoli slaw, snap peas, peppers, etc)
6 fluid ounces Sesame Ginger Vinaigrette (see recipe)

instructions.text: Mix the hoisin sauce, soy sauce, grated ginger, Sriracha, rice wine vinegar and grated garlic in a large bowl or resealable plastic bag
Add the chicken strips and marinate, refrigerated, for 2 hours
Heat a grill pan over high heat
Remove the chicken strips from the marinade and grill until cooked through, about 2 minutes per side
Make the peanut sauce, Asian-marinated cucumbers, and sesame noodles
Place chicken and vegetables mixture in lettuce cups, serve with cucumbers, peanuts, peanut sauce, noodles, and extra dressing on the side

recipes.title: Thai Peanut Noodles with Beef or Chicken

ingredients.raw: 1 pound skirt steak, cut crosswise into 5- to 6-inch pieces or 1 pound chicken breast, cut in half lengthwise to thin it and then in half horizontally

ingredients.note: 1 large yellow onion 4-5 ounces of broccoli florets 5 ounces mushrooms, sliced, preferable shiitake mushrooms 1 pepper (red, yellow, or orange) Sugar snap peas

ingredients.raw: Water or chicken stock to thin as needed

instructions.text: Combine beef or chicken with the salt, sugar, soy sauce, wine, sesame oil, baking soda, and cornstarch in a ziplock bag and toss to combine, then set aside for 20 minutes
Prepare rice noodles according to package directions for using in a stir fry
In a medium bowl, whisk together peanut butter, soy sauce, garlic, honey, ginger, vinegar, sesame oil and Sriracha, if using, thin out to desired consistency with water or stock and set aside
Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a wok over high heat until smoking
Add 2 pieces of the beef or chicken and cook without moving until lightly browned on first side, about 2 minutes
Flip meat and cook for another 2 minutes
Continue flipping and cooking, until meat is well charred and barely cooked through
Transfer to a large plate, cover with foil, and allow to rest
Add remaining 1 tablespoon oil, and place over high heat until smoking
Add veggies and cook, tossing and stirring frequently, until lightly charred in spots
Add garlic, ginger, and scallions and cook, stirring, until fragrant
When vegetables are cooked, transfer meat to a cutting board and pour any accumulated juices from the plate into the wok with vegetables, then toss to coat
Add cooked rice noodles and 3/4 of the sauce
Saute for 1-2 minutes until the sauce thickens and coast the noodles and veggies
Thinly slice the beef against the grain or slice the chicken into thin strips and serve on top of the veggie/noodles mixture with the remaining sauce for drizzling

ingredients.raw: 2 scallions, diced, separating the whites and the green parts

instructions.text: Cook rice according to package directions
While rice is cooking, heat 1 tablespoon canola oil in a pan over medium heat
Add whites of the scallions, red pepper flakes, and cook for a about a minute
Add garlic and cook for another 30 seconds - 1 minute until fragrant
Add tomatoes then season with salt, black pepper, and drizzle oyster sauce, and mix until combined
Cook for about 10 minutes until tomatoes soften and cook down to a jam
Scramble eggs, pour over tomatoes in the pan, cover, and cook for about 2 minutes until set
Drizzle sesame oil over eggs and tomatoes and sprinkle greens of scallions, then mix
In a bowl, add rice and drizzle with a little bit of soy sauce and oyster sauce
Top with eggs and tomato mixture

recipes.title: Baked Fish with Garlic Herb Ritz Crumbs

ingredients.raw: 4 center-cut boneless, skinless cod or haddock fillets (6-8 ounces each)
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
It should be just big enough to hold fish

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 400°F
Pour 2 tablespoons of olive oil in 9″x9″ ceramic baking dish and coat the bottom
Place fish fillets in dish and turn to coat both sides with oil
Sprinkle fish with 1 ½ teaspoons of salt and 1/2 teaspoon of pepper, and bake for 10 minutes
While the fish is baking, in a small bowl, combine cracker crumbs, panko, parsley, garlic, lemon zest and 1 teaspoon of salt
Add melted butter and stir until evenly moistened, then set aside
Remove fish from oven and pour wine and lemon juice directly on fillets
Pat crumb mixture evenly onto fillets, pressing gently to help it stick
Return pan to oven for 12 minutes, until fillets are just cooked through in center, depending on thickness of fish
Sprinkle with salt, and serve hot with pan juices and lemon wedges

ingredients.raw: 8 clams or 1 pint of ground clams

instructions.text: Mix together flour, baking powder, salt and pepper
Mix in eggs and milk
Dice up clams and add into mix
Pour half a bottle of canola oil into a large frying pan (not going to use it all and can put the remaining back in the bottle after done frying)
Once oil reached a temperature of about 350°F, add clam mix into frying pan in the shape of a patty
Cook until outside is crispy and then cut inside to make sure it is fully cooked

ingredients.raw: 1 pound cod or haddock fillets cut into 4 square 4-ounce portions
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 375°F convection and line a baking sheet with parchment paper
Heat panko bread crumbs in the oven on a small baking sheet until brown, about 5 minutes
To prepare the slaw, combine vinegar, mustard, mayonnaise, and sugar in a medium bowl
Add slaw mix and combine, then add salt and pepper to taste, and set aside for at least 15 minutes
To prepare the fish, mix egg, mayo, mustard, flour, salt, and pepper in a small bowl
Combine the panko, garlic, onion and paprika in another shallow bowl
Coat fish in batter
Place in panko mixture and use the other hand to cover top and sides with breadcrumbs, pressing to adhere
Transfer fish to tray and repeat with remaining fish
Spray the top of the fish with vegetable oil
Bake 15-20 minutes until fish is cooked through and browned
To serve, place a small pile of slaw on the bottom half of each bun
Top with a piece of fish and a dollop of tartar sauce

ingredients.raw: 1 pound firm white fish, such as cod or halibut, cut into 2-inch pieces

instructions.text: Set oven to 375°F convection
Add panko, chili powder, garlic powder, cumin, salt, pepper to a bowl whisk the mixture until combined
Now, set up an assembly line with the (1) fish, (2) whisked egg, (3) panko mixture and (4) parchment-covered baking sheet
Using your right hand, dip a piece of fish in the egg so that it is coated on all sides
Using your left hand, transfer the fish to the panko mixture and gently press it on so that the fish is coated on all sides
Using your left hand, transfer the fish to the baking sheet
Repeat the process with the remaining fish
Bake the fish for 10 minutes, or until it is cooked through and opaque and flakes easily with a fork
Fill a tortilla with a few spoonfuls of the slaw, followed by the fish, and any desired toppings (cabbage slaw, pickled onion)
Drizzle with the cilantro lime sauce and serve

recipes.title: Grilled Mahi Mahi with Pineapple Mango Salsa

ingredients.note: Cumin Garlic powder Onion powder Paprika Oregano Lemon pepper

instructions.text: Make pineapple mango salsa
Heat grill to medium/high
Whisk marinade ingredients together in a bowl
Place the Mahi Mahi fish in a zip lock bag and pour the marinade over it
Place the bag in the refrigerator for 45 minutes-1 hour
After 45 minutes remove the Mahi Mahi fish from the refrigerator and dust each side of the Mahi Mahi with the rub
Place the Mahi Mahi fish on the grill and grill for about 4-5 minutes
Flip and grill for 3-4 more minutes until done
Serve with salsa

ingredients.raw: 1 dozen large freshly shucked Oysters on the half shell
Extra Pecorino Romano or Parmesan for sprinkling

instructions.text: Mix together all of the ingredients, except the oysters
Heat a charcoal or gas grill until very, very hot
Place the oysters on the hottest spot on the grill and let them cook in their own juices for a few minutes, just until they start to bubble and the edges curl
Top each with a generous portion of the mixture made in step 1, enough to fill up the shell
When the sauce starts to bubble and sizzle sprinkle each oyster with about a tablespoon of Pecorino Romano
Let the Oysters go until the sauce on the edges of the shells gets nice and brown
Preheat oven to 400°
In a shallow bowl, combine first seven ingredients
Place pecans in another shallow bowl
Dip fillets in honey mixture, then coat with pecans
Place in a greased baking dish
Bake, uncovered, 15-20 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork

recipes.title: Halibut with Balsamic Glaze
notes: Can be served with sliced grape tomatoes mixed with pesto and the reserved marinade

instructions.text: Whisk the vinegar, honey, oil, and garlic in a bowl
Arrange halibuts in an 8-inch square baking dish
Pour marinade over the fish, coating it completely
Cover and refrigerate at least 30 minutes and up to 4 hours
Preheat the broiler
Line the bottom and sides of a baking sheet with foil and spray foil with cooking spray
Remove fish from marinade, reserving marinade, and arrange the fillets atop the baking sheet
Pour the marinade into a heavy small saucepan
Broil the fillets until they are just cooked through and caramelized on top, about 12 minutes
Meanwhile bring the marinade to a boil and simmer until it thickens slightly and becomes syrupy, whisking often, about 15 minutes
Spoon off any excess oil from the sauce, if desired
Transfer the fillets to plates
Spoon the sauce over and around the fillets and serve

ingredients.raw: 1 lb chopped clams from seafood dept (or 2 6.5-ounce) cans chopped clams), drained with juice reserved
1 tablespoon chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley (or 1 teaspoon dried)
1 tablespoon chopped fresh basil (or 1 teaspoon dried)

instructions.text: Chop onions
Heat the olive oil in pan
Add the onion and red pepper flakes and saute over medium heat until translucent for 5-10 minutes
Add 1/2 teaspoon salt while onions are cooking
Mince and add garlic and cook for 1 more minute, constantly stirring
Add the tomato paste and cook, stirring until softened for about 2 minutes
Add the wine and cook on high heat, scraping up all the brown bits in the pan, until almost all the liquid evaporates for about 3 minutes
Stir in the tomatoes, clam juice, basil, oregano, parsley, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and pepper
Simmer sauce for about 15 minutes
Add in chopped clams and littlenecks and cover and simmer until littlenecks open.
Serve over prepared pasta

ingredients.raw: ½ cup finely chopped shallots, from 2 shallots
1 cup dry white wine, such as Pinot Grigio, Chardonnay or Sauvignon Blanc
1 lb chopped clams from seafood dept (or 2 6.5-ounce) cans chopped clams),
¼ cup plus 2 tablespoons fresh flat-leaf parsley, finely chopped
1 lb box of linguine, prepared al dente

instructions.text: Heat the olive oil in pan
Add the shallots and red pepper flakes and saute over medium heat until translucent for 5-10 minutes
Add 1/2 teaspoon salt while onions are cooking
Add garlic and oregano and cook for 1 more minute, constantly stirring
Add the wine, clam juice, chopped clams with juice and ¼ cup parsley and bring to a simmer
Add clams, cover and simmer about 8-10 ,minutes until all the clams open
Transfer the clams to a plate and cover to keep warm
Add linguine to pan with sauce and increase the heat to medium and cook tossing occasionally, until the pasta absorbs some of the sauce and is just tender, 1 to 2 minutes
Add the butter, lemon juice, and the remaining 2 tablespoons of parsley; toss to coat

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ pounds Cod fillet pieces (4-6 pieces)
5 tablespoons Private Reserve extra virgin olive oil
Reserve the lemon juice mixture for later
Watch the oil to be sure it is shimmering but not smoking

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 400°F
Mix lemon juice, olive oil, and melted butter in a shallow bowl, then set aside
In another shallow bowl, mix all-purpose flour, spices, salt and pepper, then set aside next to the lemon juice mixture
Pat fish fillet dry and dip fish in the lemon juice mixture then dip in the flour mixture and shake off excess flour
Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a cast iron skillet over medium-high heat
Add fish and sear on each side to give it some color, but do not fully cook (about a couple minutes on each side), then remove from heat
To the remaining lemon juice mixture, add the minced garlic and mix and drizzle all over the fish fillets
Bake in the heated oven until it begins to flake easily with a fork (about 10 minutes should do it, but begin checking earlier)
Remove from heat and sprinkle chopped parsley

ingredients.raw: 3-4 pounds of mussels (about 1 pound per person), scrubbed and debearded
1/4 pound turkey chorizo or andouille sausage
1 (15-ounce) can cannellini or other white beans, drained and rinsed
Add the water if you need to thin out the sauce

instructions.text: Grate the garlic, sprinkle with the salt, and mash with the side of a knife to create a paste
In a sauté pan over medium-high heat, heat 2 tablespoons of the olive oil
Add the onion and garlic and sauté, stirring occasionally, until the onions are soft, about 3-5 minutes
Add the tomato paste and cook, stirring, for 1 minute more
Remove from the heat and set aside
In a large pot over medium-high heat, heat the last tablespoon of olive oil
Add the chorizo and cook, stirring frequently, until browned and aromatic, about 2-3 minutes
Add the onion, garlic, tomato paste mixture and cook, stirring, for 1 minute more
Add the wine and stir to scrape up any browned bits on the pot bottom
Add the beans and tomatoes and bring the mixture to a boil
Add the mussels and cover the pot
Steam the mussels until they open, 4 to 5 minutes
Remove the lid and discard any mussels that have not opened
Serve with crusty bread for dipping

ingredients.raw: 1 teaspoon black pepper, more as needed
1 ¼ pounds skinless haddock, cod or other white fish fillets, cut into 1-inch-thick strips
1 ½ pounds russet potatoes (about 3 large), cut into 1/4-inch-thick sticks

instructions.text: Arrange 2 oven racks in the top and bottom third of the oven
Place a large rimmed baking sheet on the lower rack and heat oven to 425°F convection
Spread the panko bread crumbs on a baking sheet and put in the oven for about 5 minutes until brown (watch so it doesn’t burn!)
Put the toasted panko in a shallow dish with the thyme, garlic and 1/2 teaspoon pepper
In a separate bowl, whisk together mustard and eggso
Place flour, garlic, onion powder and paprika in a third bowl
Grease an oven-safe wire rack with oil and place it over another rimmed baking sheet
Season fish with 1 teaspoon salt and 1/2 teaspoon pepper
Dip each piece of fish in the flour, then mustard mixture, then panko mixture, then transfer fish to the wire rack
In a large bowl, toss together potatoes, 2 tablespoons oil, 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1/2 teaspoon pepper
Carefully spread potatoes out on preheated baking sheet and return to oven’s lower rack
Roast for about 25 minutes until slightly golden and crispy, tossing after 15 minutes
Put the second pan, with the fish still on the wire rack, to the oven's top rack
Bake until fish is flaky and golden and potatoes are well browned and tender, about 10-15 minutes more
Salt fish and potatoes immediately after removing from oven
Serve hot, with tartar sauce alongside for dipping

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ pounds of haddock (or cod) fillets

instructions.text: Heat oven to 425°F convection
Spread the panko bread crumbs on a baking sheet and put in the oven for about 5 minutes until brown (watch so it doesn’t burn!)
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper
Cut fish into 6 ounce portions
Sprinkle fish with salt and pepper
Put the toasted panko in a shallow dish
Put the flour in another shallow dish
Combine the eggs, mayonnaise and seasonings in another shallow dish
Dip each piece of fish into the flour, then the eggs/mayonnaise mixture, then panko pressing it down firmly until it sticks to the fish
Arrange fish on baking sheet
Bake for 15-20 minutes until fish flakes easily with a fork

recipes.title: Pan Seared Cod in White Wine Tomato Basil sauce

ingredients.raw: A pinch crushed red pepper flakes
1 pint cherry tomatoes, sliced in half
1/4 teaspoon fresh ground black pepper (more to taste)
1 ½ pounds fresh cod, cut into 4 fillets (or four 6 ounce fillets)

instructions.text: Heat oil in a large saute pan over medium heat
Add crushed red pepper flakes and garlic and saute for 1 minute, or until garlic is fragrant
Add the cherry tomatoes and cook, stirring occasionally, until they're soft and blistering, but still hold their shape, 9-12 minutes
Add in the white wine, stir, and allow the mixture to come to a gentle simmer
Stir in the basil, lemon juice, lemon zest, salt, sugar, and pepper and cook for 2 minutes
Transfer the sauce into a bowl and set aside
Add butter to the saute pan and melt
Add vegetable, then season with salt and pepper, and cook until it reaches desired tenderness, then set aside
Pat the cod dry with paper towels, then season both sides of cod with salt and pepper
Heat oil in a large saute pan over medium heat
Place cod in the oil and cook until golden brown, about 3 minutes
Carefully flip cod over and continue cooking for another 3-4 minutes, until it's cooked
Scatter vegetables throughout pan around cod
Pour the white wine tomato basil sauce over the cod, let the sauce warm up for a minute, then remove from heat and serve

recipes.title: Air Fryer Ginger Glazed Salmon Bites

ingredients.raw: 1 pound salmon, cut into bite-size pieces
3 tablespoon Japanese mayo (or 3 tablespoons regular mayo mixed with ¾ teaspoon rice vinegar and ⅛ teaspoon sugar)
Cornstarch slurry: 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 tablespoons cold water

instructions.text: Marinate the salmon with honey, freshly grated ginger, soy sauce, oyster sauce, Japanese mayo, salt, and pepper for 20 minutes
Air fry at 380°F for 10 minutes, flipping halfway through
Optional: To make a honey glaze sauce to drizzle over the salmon, add soy sauce, honey, ginger, and water to a pot
Bring it to a simmer on medium-high heat for 2-3 minutes or until bubbly
Add cornstarch and water slurry to thicken, and simmer for another 1 minute
Serve with rice and stir fried vegetables (broccoli, mushrooms, onion), avocado and asian pickled cucumbers (see more detailed recipe)
Drizzle the sauce over the salmon and vegetables, and garnish with sesame seeds

ingredients.raw: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions.text: Whisk glaze ingredients together in a small saucepan
Then bring to boil over medium-high heat, simmer until thickened, about 3 minutes, then remove from heat and cover to keep warm
Heat oven to 300°F
Combine brown sugar, salt, and cornstarch in small bowl
Pat salmon dry with paper towels and season with pepper
Sprinkle brown sugar mixture evenly over salmon, rubbing to distribute
Heat oil in 12-inch oven safe nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until just smoking
Place salmon in skillet and cook until well browned for about 1 minute
Using tongs, carefully flip salmon and cook on other side for 1 minute
Remove skillet from heat and spoon glaze evenly over salmon filet
Transfer skillet to oven and cook until center of thickest part of filets registers 125°F on thermometer and is still translucent when cut into with paring knife for about 7-10 minutes

ingredients.raw: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions.text: Add the orange juice, balsamic vinegar, honey, white wine vinegar, red pepper flakes, and rosemary and whisk ingredients together in small saucepan
Bring to boil over medium-high heat
Simmer until thickened for about 5 minutes
Remove from heat and cover to keep warm
Heat oven to 300°F
Combine brown sugar, salt, and cornstarch in small bowl
Pat salmon dry with paper towels and season with pepper
Sprinkle brown sugar mixture evenly over salmon, rubbing to distribute
Heat oil in 12-inch oven safe nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until just smoking
Place salmon in skillet and cook until well browned for about 1 minute
Using tongs, carefully flip salmon and cook on other side for 1 minute
Remove skillet from heat and spoon glaze evenly over salmon fillet
Transfer skillet to oven and cook until center of thickest part of fillets registers 125°F on thermometer and is still translucent when cut into with paring knife for about 7-10 minutes
Transfer fillets to platter or individual plates and serve

ingredients.raw: If the skin is still on the fish don’t grease the foil, you want the skin to stick when it’s done
There should be about 5-7 inches between the broiler and the rack

instructions.text: An hour before cooking place the salmon on a foil covered baking sheet
Sprinkle the salmon with kosher salt and put in refrigerator
Mix the brown sugar, mustard and bourbon to make a paste
Preheat oven to 250°F
When heated change oven to broil
Remove salmon from fridge and pat dry with a paper towel
Brush the salmon generously with the glaze
Place under broiler
Broil for 10 minutes the change over to bake at 250°F and cook for another 5-10 minutes until done
Preheat oven to 400°F
Whisk together mustard and maple syrup, and add a splash of lemon juice if desired
Pat fillet dry with a paper towel
Brush flesh side of salmon in the mustard-maple marinade until coated
Sprinkle bagel seasoning onto flesh side of salmon until well coated
Place salmon in a pan and bake in the oven for 10 minutes or until salmon has reached an internal temperature of 145°F
Combine all marinade ingredients in a measuring cup or small bowl and mix together
Reserve about 1/4-1/3 cup of the marinade
Place salmon and remaining marinade into a gallon size ziploc bag, then seal and refrigerate for 1-3 hours to allow flavors to penetrate the fish
While salmon is marinating, pour the reserved marinade into a small saucepan and bring to a boil, then simmer for a few minutes until it thickens and set aside to cool
Preheat grill to medium high heat
Lower heat to medium and oil the grill grates
Place a salmon fillet on the grill skin side down
Brush the top with a little of the marinade
Grill for 10-15 minutes with the lid closed
Oil the grill grates and flip the salmon on the grill to sear the top
Carefully scrape off the skin (it should lift right off) and brush with glazed marinade and grill about 1-2 minutes

ingredients.raw: 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice (juice of 1/2 a lemon)

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 375°F and line a baking tray with a large piece of foil, big enough to fold over and seal the salmon
In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low-medium heat
Add the honey, garlic and lemon, and whisk until the honey has melted through the butter and the mixture is well combined, about 2 minutes
Season salmon with salt and pepper, and place the salmon onto the lined baking tray
Pour the butter/honey mixture over the salmon, and using a pastry brush or spoon, spread evenly over the salmon
Place a few lemon slices in the foil surrounding the salmon
Fold the sides of the foil over the salmon to cover and completely seal the packet closed so the butter does not leak
Bake until cooked through, about 15-18 minutes, depending on the thickness of your fish
Open the foil and grill/ broil for 2-3 minutes to caramelise the top
Garnish with parsley, if desired, and serve with lemon slices

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ pounds of boneless and skinless salmon
4 tablespoons mustard (whole grain or spicy brown)

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 400°F convection
Mix all ingredients together, except the salmon
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray foil with olive oil
If salmon has skin on it, skin the salmon
Place salmon on the baking sheet
Spread half of the sauce onto the salmon
Cook salmon in the oven for about 15 minutes, taking the salmon out halfway through to pour the rest of the sauce on

ingredients.raw: 1 medium onion cut into large pieces
4 (6-8 ounce) pieces center-cut boneless, skinless salmon fillet
Water should cover the fish, but if not, add enough to just cover salmon
Cooking time may vary widely, so be sure to check temperatures to determine doneness

instructions.text: In a large saucepan, combine 1 quart cold water with lemon juice, wine, onion, thyme, bay leaf, and a large pinch of salt
Salt and pepper both sides of each piece of salmon
Add salmon to poaching liquid
Set over medium heat and bring poaching liquid to 170°F simmer
Cook salmon until it registers 125°F when an instant-read thermometer is inserted into the thickest part of the fish, about 10-15 minutes
Carefully transfer salmon to a plate to rest
If eating cold, in a salad, place salmon in refrigerator to chill until ready to serve

ingredients.raw: 3/4 cup chicken broth plus 1 tablespoon, separated
Enough flour to coat the salmon
1/2 tablespoon chicken broth or water mixed with 1 teaspoon cornstarch
ingredients.note: Add to mixture 1 teaspoon at a time

instructions.text: Season both sides of salmon filets evenly with salt and pepper
Add 1/4 cup of the flour to a shallow dish
Dredge the salmon in the flour to evenly coat and shake off excess
Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a large nonstick pan or skillet over medium-high heat
Add 1 tablespoon oil and swirl to mix through the butter
Cook salmon filets until browned on both sides, about 2 minutes per side
Transfer to a plate and keep warm
Melt remaining 1 tablespoon butter in the pan
Saute shallots and mushrooms until soft
Add garlic and saute for about a minute until fragrant
Add wine and bring to a boil, scraping any browned bits off of the bottom of the pan
Cook until liquid is reduced by half, stirring occasionally
Add 3/4 cup broth to the pan along with the lemon juice and bring to a boil and cook for a further 3 minutes
Whisk cornstarch with the tablespoon of chicken broth
Pour the mixture into the pan, stirring through the liquid to create a sauce
Cook for 1 minute or until slightly thickened
Stir capers through the sauce
Return salmon fillets to skillet and spoon sauce over them
Cook, turning fillets once, until salmon is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork, about 2-3 minutes
Serve salmon with sauce poured over it and garnish with lemon slices
Season both sides of salmon filet evenly with salt and pepper
Add flour to a shallow dish
Dredge the salmon in the flour to evenly coat and shake off excess
Melt 1/2 tablespoon butter in a large nonstick pan or skillet over medium-high heat
Add oil and swirl to mix through the butter
Cook salmon filet until browned on both sides, about 2 minutes per side
Transfer to a plate and keep warm
Melt remaining 1/2 tablespoon butter in the pan
Saute shallots and mushrooms until soft
Add garlic and saute for about a minute until fragrant
Add wine and bring to a boil, scraping any browned bits off of the bottom of the pan
Cook until liquid is reduced by half, stirring occasionally
Add broth to pan along with the lemon juice and bring to a boil and cook for 3 minutes
Pour the chicken broth-cornstarch mixture into the pan, stirring through the liquid until simmering to create a sauce
Cook for 1 minute or until slightly thickened
Stir capers through the sauce
Return salmon filet to skillet and spoon sauce over them
Cook, turning filet once, until salmon is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork, about 2-3 minutes
Serve salmon with sauce poured over it and garnish with lemon slices

ingredients.note: Kosher Salt Black Pepper Garlic Powder Onion Powder

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 375°F and line a baking sheet with tin foil
Place salmon on baking sheet, skin side down
Season with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder
Place salmon in oven and cook for 15-20 minutes, depending on thickness
While the salmon is cooking, cook the rice according to package instructions
Once salmon is cooked, remove from oven
Place a spatula between the salmon and its skin, and remove salmon from baking sheet into serving dish
Mash salmon into pieces/ shreds
Add serving of rice and combine with salmon
Drizzle with soy sauce, kewpie mayo, and sriracha to reach desired flavor
Top with a few slices of avocado
Serve with seaweed wraps and enjoy by placing a tablespoon of salmon rice into the seaweed, then fold to eat

ingredients.raw: 1/2 sheet puff pastry, softened to room temperature

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 400°F
In a pan over medium heat, melt butter
Add the garlic and onions, cooking until translucent
Add the spinach, salt, and pepper, cooking until spinach is wilted
Add the breadcrumbs, cream cheese, parmesan, and thyme, stirring until mixture is evenly combined
Remove from heat and set aside
On a cutting board, smooth out the sheet of puff pastry and cut in half
Place a piece of salmon in the middle of each pastry and season both sides with salt and pepper
Place several spoonfuls of the spinach mixture on top of the salmon, smoothing it out so that it does not spill over the sides
Fold the edges of the puff pastry over the salmon and spinach, starting with the longer sides and then the shorter ends
Use egg wash if necessary to make the pastry stick closed
Trim any excess pastry from the ends, then fold the ends on top
Transfer for a baking sheet lined with parchment paper seam side down
Score the top of the pastry with a knife, cutting shallow diagonal lines to create a crosshatch pattern
Brush the top with the egg wash
Bake for 20-25 minutes, until pastry is golden brown

ingredients.raw: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions.text: Whisk glaze ingredients together in a small saucepan
Bring to boil over medium-high heat and simmer until thickened, about 1 minute, then remove from heat and cover to keep warm
Heat oven to 300°F
Combine brown sugar, salt, and cornstarch in small bowl
Pat salmon dry with paper towels and season with pepper
Sprinkle brown sugar mixture evenly over salmon, rubbing to distribute
Heat oil in 12-inch oven safe nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until just smoking
Place salmon in skillet and cook until well browned for about 1 minute
Using tongs, carefully flip salmon and cook on other side for 1 minute
Remove skillet from heat and spoon glaze evenly over salmon fillet
Transfer skillet to oven and cook until center of thickest part of fillets registers 125°F on thermometer and is still translucent when cut into with paring knife for about 7-10 minutes

recipes.title: Scallops
notes: Goes well with Risotto (store bought or see recipe for homemade)

ingredients.raw: 1-1 ¼ pounds dry sea scallops, approximately 16
ingredients.note: Make sure you get DRY scallops

ingredients.raw: The scallops should have a 1/4-inch golden crust on each side while still being translucent in the center

instructions.text: Remove the small side muscle from the scallops
Rinse scallops with cold water and thoroughly pat dry
Add the butter and oil to a 12 to 14-inch saute pan on high heat
Salt and pepper the scallop
Once the butter begins to smoke, gently add the scallops, making sure they are not touching each other
Sear the scallops for 1 ½ minutes on each side

recipes.title: Seafood Paella (one-pot)
notes: https://www.skinnytaste.com/weeknight-seafood-paella/

ingredients.raw: 16 extra jumbo shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 small cooked chorizo link, sliced thin
2 ½ cups chicken or vegetable broth
1/2 red bell pepper, sliced thin strips
1 tablespoon coarsely chopped parsley, for garnish

instructions.text: Clean the clams and soak in cold water for 20 minutes
Transfer the shrimp to a bowl and season with lemon juice and Old Bay seasoning
Heat a large, deep nonstick skillet over medium heat
Add 1 teaspoon of oil and sauté the chorizo, onions, garlic and paprika until soft, about 3 minutes
Push aside, add the remaining 1 ½ teaspoons oil in the center and add the rice, stirring to coat with the oil and sauté for 3 minutes
Add the diced tomatoes, broth, salt, saffron threads (crumbled between fingers) and bay leaf
Mix and bring to a boil, stirring once, place the bell pepper over the rice, reduce heat to low and cover tightly, cook for 15 minutes
Uncover and add the clams, shrimp, and peas
Cover tightly again and cook on low heat until the clams open up and the shrimp are cooked through, about 10-12 minutes
Uncover the skillet, raise the heat to medium-high and cook to toast the bottom of the rice, you should hear it sizzling, about 2-3 minutes
Discard the bay leaf and garnish with parsley

recipes.title: Seared Sesame Tuna
notes: Goes well with Asian-marinated Cucumbers (see recipe) and Sesame noodles (see recipe)

ingredients.raw: 1 ¼ pounds Tuna, (four 5-ounce pieces) about 1 inch thick
1/8-1/4 teaspoon red chili flakes, dried or more for more heat
8 tablespoons sesame seeds, (white, black or mixture of both)
2 tablespoons avocado oil, or vegetable oil
Sprinkle with more seeds as needed

instructions.text: Whisk together ginger, garlic, soy sauce, sesame oil, honey and red pepper flakes in a small bowl
Separate 1/4 cup to use as marinade and set aside rest until ready to serve as dipping sauce
In a large zip-lock bag add the tuna steaks and marinade, turning within the bag to coat them completely with the marinade
Press the excess air out of the bag, seal, and marinate in the refrigerator for about 20 minutes to an hour
Place sesame seeds on a plate
Remove the tuna steaks from the marinade bag and pat dry with a paper towel to remove excess water
Dredge and press tuna in sesame seeds, coating the tuna evenly
In a medium frying pan (cast iron is best) over high heat, warm the oil until just smoking
Frying two portions at a time, arrange the tuna steaks in the pan (do not overcrowd) and cook until the sesame seeds start to turn golden underneath, about 1 minute
Turn the tuna over and cook for 1 minute
Sear the edges of the tuna for 15 seconds on each edge
Transfer the tuna to a plate to keep warm and repeat with remaining tuna portions
Transfer tuna to a cutting board and cut 1/4-inch thick slices
Arrange tuna on individual serving plates or bowls and serve with asian-marinated cucumbers and remaining sauce

recipes.title: Shrimp
notes: “16-20” count or bigger: Extra Jumbo; good for kebabs or cocktail
“21-25” count: Jumbo/ large; good for stir fry or scampi
“41-50” count: Medium; good for fried rice or soup

ingredients.raw: Skewer makes it easy to cook on grill so shrimp doesn’t fall through
No need to let sit at all

instructions.text: If frozen, put shrimp in bowl and fill with cool/warm water to defrost for 20 min
Peel shrimp and place on paper towels on plate
Put shrimp into bowl
If not being used right away, place in fridge for 20-30 minutes
Place shrimp through a skewer and paint whatever marinade/ sauce is being used on both sides of shrimp
Grill shrimp on high for about 2 minutes on each side or until pink and continue painting marinade on shrimp for more flavor
If frozen, put shrimp in bowl and fill with cool/warm water to defrost for 15 minutes
Peel shrimp and place on paper towels on plate
If using a marinade (liquid sauce), place shrimp in a bag, pour marinade in with shrimp, close bag and let marinate for up to 2 hours
If using a rub (spices, no liquid), just add spices to shrimp on a plate
Using a bigger bowl-shaped pan, spray olive oil to cover bottom of pan
Cook shrimp on medium-high for about 2 minutes on each side or until pink
Ingredients for a marinade (for 2 pounds of shrimp) - great for Caesar salad
Ingredients for marinade from shrimp kebabs
Ingredients for a rub

ingredients.raw: 1/2 teaspoon of each of the following seasonings:
ingredients.note: Onion powder Garlic powder Dried basil Dried oregano Paprika Kosher Salt

ingredients.raw: Once boiling, add kosher salt and lower temp until ready to cook pasta

instructions.text: Combine ingredients for sauce and set aside in the fridge
In a large pot, boil water for pasta
In separate bowls, combine ingredients to make wet batter and dry batter
Combine wet and dry batter into one bowl and mix until it has a smooth consistency
Combine ingredients for breading
Add pasta to boiling water and cook according to package directions
Fill a large frying skillet with oil about 1/4-inch deep and heat to 350°F
Set up a dredging station dipping shrimp completely into the batter mix then coating with the panko breading mix
In a small saucepan or in the microwave, heat the sauce until warmed
In large frying skillet, fry shrimp in the oil for around 1 ½ minutes until one side is golden brown
Flip shrimp and cook other side for 1 ½ minutes until golden brown and cooked through
Place shrimp on paper towel to drain excess oil
Add shrimp to bowl and toss with some of the sauce
Add pasta to dish and pour a light layer of sauce on top
Add shrimp to dish and garnish with chopped parsley

ingredients.raw: 1 pound extra large shrimp peeled, deveined, tail on or off
2 large eggs beaten with a fork
1/4 cup apricot jam or apricot fruit spread

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 425°F convection and line a baking sheet with parchment paper
In a shallow bowl stir together flour, garlic powder and salt
Heat panko bread crumbs in the oven on a small baking sheet until brown, about 5 minutes
In a second bowl beat the 2 eggs
In a third bowl, combine shredded coconut and panko bread crumbs
Dredge shrimp in flour, then dip in beaten egg and finally dip in crumb mixture using your hands to press the coconut crumb mixture onto your shrimp
Transfer to baking sheet and repeat with remaining shrimp
Bake on the middle rack in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until coconut is lightly toasted (light golden-brown), turning the shrimp halfway through baking
Make dipping sauce by stirring together sweet chili sauce with apricot jam
Serve shrimp immediately with the dipping sauce

ingredients.raw: 1 ¼ pound shrimp, shelled and deveined
8-10 ounces of dry orzo, depending on how much you want

instructions.text: Combine ingredients for marinade and marinate shrimp for about 30 minutes
Heat some olive oil in a pan and cook shrimp until pink, then set aside
In the same pan, add a little more olive oil and cook the shallots for 1-2 minutes
Add garlic, oregano, and red pepper flakes, cooking until shallots are translucent and soft
Add orzo and toast for 1-2 minutes
Add chicken stock to a pot and bring to a boil, then cook for 7 minutes
Add tomatoes, salt, and pepper to the pan and cook until tomatoes are soft and release their juices, about 3-4 minutes
Add spinach and lemon juice and saute until shriveled
Add parmesan cheese and mix to combine until melted and absorbed
Add back the shrimp and parsley and mix to combine
If there is still too much liquid, allow orzo to cook for another 2 minutes, uncovered
Turn off heat and mix orzo
When ready to serve, sprinkle feta cheese into pan and mix to combine

ingredients.raw: 1 pound medium shrimp, peeled and deveined and rinsed
1/2 cup small diced sweet red pepper
1 plum tomato, seeded and small diced
1/2 jalapeno pepper, seeded, deviend and finely chopped
1/4 cup fresh cilantro, chopped and loosely packed
If you don't have a big enough skillet to cook all the shrimp in a single layer, use 1 tablespoon olive oil each batch

instructions.text: In a large bowl, combine all ingredients for the salsa, then cover and refrigerate for 1 hour or until chilled
Pat both sides of the shrimp dry and if needed depending on size of shrimp, cut shrimp into smaller pieces
Toss in a large bowl with the garlic, salt, cumin, chili powder, onion powder, olive oil, sugar and lime zest
Cover bowl and place in fridge for at least 15 minutes while preparing the other toppings
In a large skillet add shrimp in a single layer and saute until they just turn pink
Flip shrimp over halfway through, 2 to 4 minutes depending on their size
Remove from heat, add to bowl, and add small squeeze of lime juice to shrimp (optional)
To assemble the tacos, fill a tortilla with a small spoonful of the slaw, followed by the shrimp, and pineapple mango salsa, then drizzle with cilantro lime sauce and serve

ingredients.raw: 1 pound large raw shrimp, peeled and deveined
4 ounces mozzarella cheese (about 1 ½ cups shredded)
2 tablespoons parsley, finely chopped, plus more to garnish
1/2 teaspoon Kosher salt, or to taste
1/4 cup all-purpose flour, or gluten free flour
2 tablespoons light olive oil, or high heat cooking oil of choice
You can use a food processor to chop the shrimp, but pulse carefully so you don't turn it into ground shrimp meat/ juices

instructions.text: Pat dry shrimp with paper towels then dice into pea-sized pieces
Transfer chopped shrimp to a large mixing bowl
Add shredded mozzarella, egg, mayo, parsley, salt, and black pepper
Stir together then add 1/4 cup flour and mix until batter is creamy and well combined
Heat a large non-stick pan over medium heat and add 1 tablespoon olive oil
Add 1 heaping tablespoon of fritter mix at a time and flatten out the tops of your fritters as you go so they are about 1/2-inch thick patties
Saute about 3 minutes per side or until golden brown on the edges and cooked through

ingredients.raw: 1 ¼ pounds jumbo shrimp (easy peel and deveined shrimp)

ingredients.note: 1 ½ Peppers (1/2 of each color if using 3) 1 Vidalia Onion Mushrooms Zucchini

instructions.text: If frozen, put shrimp in bowl and fill with cool/warm water to defrost for 15 minutes
If using wooden sticks for kebabs soak them in cold water
In this order: Mix lime juice, olive oil, honey, soy sauce, sweet chili sauce
Mince garlic cloves and mix in with rest of ingredients
Pour half of sauce into another cup
Peel shrimp and place on paper towel on plate
Put shrimp on sticks and put in fridge 20-30 minutes
Cut peppers into square/ cube shape (3 cuts of each color per person - 9/person)
Cut onion into square/ cube and separate pieces
Peel outer layer of mushroom and cut off stems
Cut 2 circles of zucchini per person
Put vegetables on sticks
Paint sauce from first bowl on both sides of vegetables and shrimp
Put vegetable kebabs on grill on low medium
After 5 minutes, flip over veggies and paint on more sauce from the second bowl
Put the shrimp kebabs on the grill on high
After 2 minutes (when they are looking pink), flip over kebabs and paint on more sauce from the second bowl
Leave kebabs on grill for another 2 minutes or until pink, flip over for another minute
Take vegetables and shrimp off the grill and enjoy!

recipes.title: Shrimp Tacos
notes: If desired, add a squeeze of fresh lime juice to the shrimp

ingredients.raw: 1 pound medium shrimp, peeled and deveined and rinsed
If you don't have a big enough skillet to cook all the shrimp in a single layer, using 1 tablespoon olive oil each batch

instructions.text: Pat both sides of the shrimp dry and then gently toss in a large bowl with the garlic, salt, cumin, chili powder, onion powder, olive oil, sugar and lime zest
Cover bowl and place in the fridge for at least 15 minutes while preparing the rest of this dish
In a large skillet add shrimp in a single layer and saute until they just turn pink
Flip shrimp over halfway through, 2 to 4 minutes depending upon their size
Remove from heat and set aside to a cutting board
Fill a tortilla with a few spoonfuls of the slaw, followed by the fish, and any desired toppings (cabbage slaw, pickled onion)
Drizzle with the cilantro lime sauce and serve
Combine all ingredients except shrimp in a blender or food processor to combine
Combine marinade and shrimp in a gallon sized ziploc bag and let sit overnight
When ready to cook put shrimp on skewers and grill on high heat until cooked through

recipes.title: Steamed Clams in a White Wine and Tomato Sauce

ingredients.raw: 3 shallots or 1 small onion, diced small
1 cup Sauvignon Blanc or other white wine

instructions.text: In a large skillet or pot set over medium-high heat, melt the butter and olive oil
Add the shallots and sauté until soft, about 5 minutes, then add the garlic and sauté for two minutes, stirring frequently
Add the tomatoes, clams, mussels, wine, and broth, and cover with a tight fitting lid
Bring pot to a boil, reduce heat, and steam over low heat until clams and mussels have opened, about 5-10 minutes
As clams open, remove from pot, set aside, and discard any clams that have not opened
Season broth with herbs and a squeeze of lemon
Transfer clams to serving bowls and ladle with broth
Serve hot with crusty bread to soak up the broth

ingredients.raw: 10-12 large chowder or quahog clams, rinsed, sand and grit removed
2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley (or 2 teaspoons dried)
1 cup breadcrumbs or crushed ritz crackers
1/4-1/2 cup clam cooking liquid from steaming the clams
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
1/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons grated Parmesan cheese
If too dry, add a bit more butter or clam juice
If too wet, add a bit more bread crumbs

instructions.text: To cook the clams fill a large pot with 1 ½ to 2 inches of water
Bring water to a boil
Add the clams to the boiling water, reduce the heat to a simmer, and let the clams steam for approximately 5 minutes, until the shells start to open
Remove clams from the pot and let cool enough to handle
Remove the clam meat from the clams but not the clam 2 muscles attached to the shell and mince
Pick the best clam shells for serving, then break apart the clam shells from their hinges
Rinse the shells, pick 10-12 of the cleanest, nicest looking clam shells and set aside
To make the stuffing, preheat oven to 350°F
In a sauté pan, melt the butter on medium heat and add the minced onion and cook for 2-3 minutes until softened
Once the onions have softened add the garlic and linguica, and cook for about 2 minutes
Transfer to a large bowl, then add the parsley, bread crumbs, Italian seasoning, 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, minced clams, lemon juice, and clam juice
Stir until the stuffing mixture is completely moistened
To bake, lay clam shells on a baking dish
Scoop stuffing mixture onto each clam shell then sprinkle with grated Parmesan
Bake at 350°F for approximately 20-25 minutes, until Parmesan is lightly browned on top

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ pounds boneless skinless chicken thighs

ingredients.note: Chili powder Onion powder Garlic powder Kosher salt Cayenne pepper (optional)

ingredients.raw: 1 jalapeno, diced seeds removed if no heat

ingredients.note: Ground coriander Cumin Turmeric Garlic powder Oregano Kosher salt Black pepper

ingredients.raw: 1 cup tomato sauce or crushed tomatoes

instructions.text: Add chicken to a large bowl and combine 1 tablespoon olive oil and the adobo seasoning and massage into the chicken, then set aside and marinate for about 30 minutes
Add remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil to a large deep 10 inch skillet and place over medium high heat
Once oil is hot, add in chicken and cook until browned 4-5 minutes, then flip and and cook an additional 4-5 minutes, then remove from pan and set aside
In the same skillet make the sofrito by adding in garlic, jalapeno, diced green pepper, diced onion and cilantro
Saute for 2-3 minutes, then add in the spices and cook for 30 seconds
Add in tomato sauce and broth and stir well to combine
Bring to a simmer then fold in the rice, peas making sure they're evenly distributed
Add browned chicken, reduce heat to low, cover the skillet, and cook for 20-25 minutes
After 20-25 minutes, most of the liquid should be absorbed and rice should be cooked
Garnish with cilantro and serve with a squeeze of fresh lime juice

ingredients.raw: 1 pound lean ground beef (about a package of beef)
1 medium diced white or yellow onion
Taco seasoning, store bought, or with the following spices:
ingredients.note: 2 teaspoons ground cumin 2 teaspoons ground coriander 1 teaspoon smoked paprika 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder 1/2 teaspoon onion powder 2 teaspoons chili powder 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon freshly cracked pepper

ingredients.raw: 1/2-1 can Rotel diced tomatoes with green chilies, drained
1/4 cup shredded cheese plus more for sprinkling
Pico de Gallo (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
Guacamole (store bought or see recipe for homemade)

instructions.text: Prepare rice according to package directions
In a large skillet over medium heat, cook the ground beef and until browned
Add onions and garlic and cook until softened, then drain excess grease from the skillet
Return to the stove and reduce the heat to low
Add the taco seasoning, tomatoes and 1/2 can enchilada sauce and stir together until well blended and simmer for 5-10 minutes
Season to taste with additional salt and pepper, if needed
Meanwhile, heat the refried beans in a saucepan over medium-low heat
Add the other half of the can of enchilada sauce and the 1/4 cup of cheese to pan, and stir it in until melted, then remove from the heat
Wrap tortilla shells in damp paper towel and warm in microwave for about 30 seconds
Place burrito on work surface, then spread about 1/4 cup of beans on the tortillas just below the center
Top with 1/4 cup of rice, 1/4 cup beef, then some cheese, pico and guacamole
Fold up the bottom to cover the filling then fold the edges in
Roll up tightly, then wrap in foil, and serve as is or bake at 350°F for 20 minutes in foil

ingredients.raw: 1 10-ounce can of Rotel diced tomatoes with mild green chilies
2 ½ cups Mexican-blend shredded cheese, separated
Guacamole (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
Pico de Gallo (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
Crumbled cheese (cotija cheese, queso fresco, etc.)

instructions.text: In a small bowl, combine chili powder, 1 teaspoon cumin, salt, and pepper
Season both sides of the chicken with the mixture and rub to coat
To cook in instant pot:
OR To cook on skillet:
While the chicken is cooking, dice the pepper and onion into small pieces/ cubes
Preheat the oven to 350°F
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add onion and pepper and cook until onion is soft, about 5 minutes
Add garlic and cumin and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute
Add enchilada sauce and tomatoes and cook until warmed through, about 2-5 minutes
Once enchilada mixture is warm, turn off heat
Set aside 1/2 cup of this sauce for topping the enchiladas
Drain and rinse black beans
In a medium bowl, combine chicken with another 1 cup scoop of the enchilada sauce mixture and toss with chicken to combine
Add black beans, cilantro and 1 ½ cups of the shredded cheese (add more cheese if desired)
Spray a 9x13 inch baking dish with cooking spray and spread the remaining sauce from the pan on the bottom
Add a small scoop of the chicken mixture in the center of 1 tortilla, then roll up tight and place seam side down in the dish of enchilada sauce
Spread the reserved 1/2 cup enchilada sauce on top and sprinkle with remaining 1 cup of cheese
Bake uncovered for about 20 minutes or until cheese is bubbling and melted and the enchiladas are cooked through

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ - 1 ¾ pounds chicken tenderloins or boneless, skinless chicken breasts
About 1/4 cup lime juice (from the 2 limes)
1 large red onion, sliced 1/4 inch thick
Pico de Gallo (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
Guacamole (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
Depending on the size of the pan, you may have to work in batches
You want them to sear with some blackening

instructions.text: Slice thick chicken breasts in half horizontally to thin so that the center thickness is around 1/2-inch to 3/4-inch thick
In a bowl, mix together all ingredients for the chicken except the lime juice
Open a 1 gallon zip-lock bag and pour mix into the bag
Add the chicken breasts and seal shut, releasing any air in the bag
Using your hands, massage the marinade into meat until evenly coated
Let the chicken marinate at least 8 hours or up to 24 hours in the refrigerator
An hour before cooking add the lime juice to the marinade bag
Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large (preferably cast iron) frying pan on high heat for about a minute
As soon as the oil begins to smoke, lay the chicken breast pieces in the pan
Let the chicken cook undisturbed for 2-3 minutes, until you have a good sear
Once seared well on one side, turn the pieces over and cook for another 2-3 minutes until well seared on the second side
Once seared on the second side, remove to a plate or cutting board and cover with aluminum foil to rest
Once the chicken is cooked and while it is resting, cook the onions and peppers
Add another tablespoon of oil to the frying pan and heat on high
In a small bowl, mix together sugar and salt
As soon as the oil is hot, add the onions and peppers and salt and sugar
Let them cook undisturbed for 2 minutes
Stir the vegetables and continue to cook for another 2 minutes
Add 1/4 cup of water to the pan

Scrape the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon to release any browned bits and continue cooking veggies for 3-4 minutes, until the water has evaporated and the vegetables are tender-crisp to the pan
Slice the chicken across the grain into strips
Add chicken in with vegetables and stir
Combine the chicken and peppers on a serving platter or bowl
To warm the tortillas: stack 4-6 tortillas on a plate and cover them with a damp paper towel, then microwave for 30 seconds
Serve with desired toppings

ingredients.raw: 2 pounds trimmed skirt or flank steak cut crosswise into 5- to 6-inch pieces or sirloin tip steak
1 large red bell pepper, stemmed, seeded, and cut into 1/2-inch-wide strips
1 large yellow bell pepper, stemmed, seeded, and cut into 1/2-inch-wide strips
1 large green bell pepper, stemmed, seeded, and cut into 1/2-inch-wide strips
1 white or yellow onion, cut into 1/2-inch slices
12-16 fresh flour or corn tortillas, hot

instructions.text: For the Fajita Marinade, combine soy sauce, lime juice, canola oil, brown sugar, cumin, black pepper, chili powder, and garlic in a medium bowl and whisk to combine
Transfer 1/2 cup marinade to a large bowl and set aside
For the Steak, place steaks in a gallon-sized zipper-lock bag and add remaining marinade
Seal bag, squeezing out as much air as possible
Massage bag until meat is fully coated in marinade
Lay flat in the refrigerator, turning every couple of hours, for at least 3 hours and up to 10
For the Fajitas, while steak marinades, toss peppers and onions in another ziploc bag with reserved 1/2 cup marinade, then refrigerate until ready to use
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large (preferably cast iron) frying pan on high heat for about 1 minute
As soon as the oil begins to smoke, lay the steak pieces in the pan
Depending on the size of the pan, you may have to work in batches
Let the steak cook undisturbed for 1-2 minutes, until you have a good sear
Once seared well on one side, turn the pieces over and cook for another 1-2 minutes until well seared on the second side
Once seared on the second side, remove to a plate or cutting board and cover with aluminum foil to rest
Once the steak is cooked and while it is resting, cook the onions and peppers
Add another tablespoon of oil to the frying pan and heat on high
Add pepper and onion mix and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are softened and beginning to char in spots, about 10 minutes
When vegetables are cooked, transfer steaks to a cutting board and pour any accumulated juices from plate into skillet with vegetables, then toss to coat
Transfer vegetables to a warm serving platter.
Thinly slice meat against the grain and transfer to platter with vegetables
Serve immediately with hot tortillas, guacamole, pico de gallo, and other condiments as desired

ingredients.raw: 1/2 large onion (preferably white/ yellow, but not required)
Pico de Gallo (store bought or see recipe for homemade)
Guacamole (store bought or see recipe for homemade)

instructions.text: In a bowl, mix all of the ingredients for the chicken together
Set aside 3 small spoonfuls of marinade for vegetables
If making the night before to marinate, place chicken pieces in a zip-lock bag, pour mixture in bag, close, and mix well, then place in the fridge for 1 hour to overnight
If making right before eating, place chicken on plate and rub mixture directly on chicken
Dice the onions and peppers into small cubes
Pour a teaspoon of olive oil into a large pan
Cook chicken for about 2 minutes on each side, or until cooked through, then set aside
If needed, add another teaspoon of olive oil to pan and cook peppers and onions
After about 2 minutes, pour marinade over vegetables, continuing cooking until vegetables are soft, pour into a bowl and set aside
Once chicken cools, dice chicken into small cubes
Using a griddle or large pan, lay down a tortilla and on one half sprinkle all desired fillings, starting with cheese, then chicken, peppers/ onions, and pico de gallo
Fold tortilla in half and cook on griddle at 325°F or on stove on medium heat for 2-3 minutes on each side until lightly browned and cheese is melted
Serve with desired toppings

recipes.title: Beef Tacos
notes: Serving size: 3 tacos per person

ingredients.raw: 1-1 ¼ pounds lean ground beef (about a package of beef)
1/2-3/4 cup chopped white or yellow onion
Taco seasoning, store bought, or with the following spices:
ingredients.note: 2 teaspoons ground cumin 2 teaspoons ground coriander 1 teaspoon smoked paprika 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder 1/2 teaspoon onion powder 2 teaspoons chili powder 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon freshly cracked pepper

ingredients.raw: 1/2-1 can Rotel diced tomatoes with green chilies, drained
Pico de Gallo (store bought or see recipe)

instructions.text: Heat a large skillet over medium heat
Add the ground beef and a pinch of salt and pepper
Break the beef up with a wooden spoon while cooking
Cook the ground beef fully, until browned and no longer pink
Add onion and garlic and cook for another 3-4 minutes
Drain any excess grease from the skillet
Then return to the stove and reduce the heat to low
Add the taco seasoning and tomatoes and stir together until well blended
Allow to simmer for 5-10 minutes
Season to taste with additional salt and pepper, if needed
Build your tacos with desired toppings and enjoy

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ pounds boneless, skinless chicken breasts or thighs

ingredients.note: 1/2 teaspoon Kosher salt 1/2 teaspoon pepper 1 teaspoon cumin 1/2 teaspoon smoked paprika 1/2 teaspoon paprika 1/4 teaspoon dried oregano 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder 1/4 teaspoon onion powder
Guacamole (store bought or see recipe for homemade) Sour Cream Freshly chopped cilantro Cabbage slaw: Lime wedges

instructions.text: Combine spices in a small bowl and coat chicken, massaging the spices into chicken
Heat 2 tablespoons avocado oil in a dutch oven over medium-high heat
Sear the chicken thighs for 3-4 mins on each side
Once the chicken is seared, remove from the dutch oven and set aside
Lower the heat in dutch oven to medium, add remaining avocado oil, and add onions and cook for 3-4 minutes until translucent
Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds - 1 minute, stirring frequently
Add chicken broth and jarred salsa, bring to a simmer, then simmer for 3-5 minutes
Add the seared chicken back to the dutch oven, cover, and simmer for 25 mins
Transfer braised chicken to cutting board and shred, then add back to sauce and mix
Assemble your tacos with desired toppings and a squeeze of lime juice and enjoy!

ingredients.note: Onion powder Garlic powder Salt Pepper Grated parmesan cheese

instructions.text: Cut off the bottoms
Lay out across baking pan
Drizzle olive oil on asparagus
Sprinkle with seasonings (just enough to coat)
Bake in the oven for 20 minutes at 400°F convection

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ cups brown jasmine rice (Or long grain brown rice, or brown basmati rice)

instructions.text: Rinse the rice under cold running water until clear
Pour the rice, water, and salt into the pressure cooker pot and stir
Pressure cook the rice: Lock the lid and cook on high pressure for 20 minutes in an electric PC, or 16 minutes in a stovetop PC
Let pressure come down naturally, about 15 minutes
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve
Preheat oven to 450°F (425°F convection)
Cover a baking sheet with aluminum foil and set aside
Rinse sprouts in cool water and then chop off the tough ends, then chop sprouts in half
Whisk together oil, half the balsamic vinegar, minced garlic, salt, and pepper
Drizzle over the chopped sprouts and then toss to combine
Spread the sprouts out evenly over the baking sheet
Roast for 20-25 minutes or until the sprouts are tender-crisp
Sprinkle with salt to taste
Preheat oven to 425°F, line a baking sheet with aluminum foil, and spray with olive oil
In a measuring glass, whisk together olive oil, balsamic vinegar, honey, salt, and pepper
Set aside 1 tablespoon of the honey-balsamic mixture in a separate small bowl
Add brussels sprouts into the large bowl and toss well to coat with the sauce
Transfer the Brussels sprouts onto a baking sheet and spread into a single layer
Bake for 20-25 minutes until the Brussels sprouts are tender and caramelized
Drizzle the remaining tablespoon of the honey-balsamic mixture over the Brussels sprouts and toss well to combine evenly

recipes.title: Goat Cheese and Pancetta Brussel Sprouts

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 425°F, line a baking sheet with aluminum foil, and spray with olive oil
In a large mixing bowl, toss brussel sprouts with olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder
Transfer the Brussels sprouts onto a baking sheet and spread into a single layer
Bake for 20-30 minutes until the Brussels sprouts are tender and caramelized
While baking, cook the pancetta in a small pan on the stove at medium heat
When done, add brussel sprouts, pancetta, and goat cheese to a bowl and toss to combine
Once served on a plate, drizzle with balsamic glaze

ingredients.raw: 1 pound Brussels sprouts, trimmed and halved
If using an air fryer, spray air fryer with cooking spray
If using pre-cooked bacon, add to pan in the last 2-3 minutes to warm
If using air fryer, cook at 400°F for 6 minutes, then shake and cook for another 6-8 minutes until crispy

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 425°F, line a baking sheet with aluminum foil, and spray with olive oil
In a large mixing bowl, toss brussel sprouts with olive oil, salt, and pepper
Transfer the Brussels sprouts onto a baking sheet or the air fryer and spread into a single layer
Sprinkle bacon throughout pan with brussel sprouts
Bake for 35 minutes until the Brussels sprouts are tender and caramelized, rotating the pan about 15 minutes in

When brussel sprouts are almost done, heat maple syrup, balsamic vinegar, honey, and a pinch of salt in a small saucepan over medium high heat until boiling and it starts to thicken, about 4-5 minutes
When brussel sprouts are done, add to a large bowl, coat with maple balsamic sauce, and serve

ingredients.raw: 3 cups shredded cabbage or bagged coleslaw mix
About 1/2 cup cilantro lime sauce (see recipe - start with less and add if needed)

instructions.text: Mix slaw with sauce and let it sit in fridge for about 15 minutes

ingredients.raw: Several medium or large onions, yellow, white, or red
As soon as the onions start sticking to the pan, let them stick a little and brown, but then stir them before they burn

instructions.text: Slice the onions in half and then slice in 1/4-inch slices root to tip
Coat the bottom of the pan with olive oil, or a mixture of olive oil and butter
Heat the pan on medium high heat until the oil is shimmering
Add the onion slices and stir to coat the onions with the oil
Spread the onions out evenly over the pan and let cook, stirring occasionally - do not burn
After about 5 minutes sprinkle with a little salt and reduce the heat to medium or medium low to prevent the onions from burning
Let cook for 30 minutes to an hour more, stirring every few minutes
When the onions are nice a brown remove from heat and use as a side or topping
In a small pot, combine the rice with 1 cup water and the coconut milk, season with salt and bring to a simmer
Cover and cook over medium-low until the rice is just tender, 12-15 minutes for white rice, 20-25 minutes for brown rice
Remove from the heat and add the lime juice, zest and scallion
Let sit, covered, until ready to serve

ingredients.raw: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions.text: Put the slaw mix in a large bowl and toss with a large pinch of salt, then set aside
Whisk together buttermilk, mayonnaise, mustard, vinegar, and sugar
Pour over cabbage and season generously with black pepper, then toss to combine
Transfer to refrigerator and let rest for 30 minutes or up to 3 days before serving

ingredients.raw: 1 cup whole wheat Israeli couscous also called pearl couscous
1 lemon, zested and juiced to get 3 tablespoons freshly squeezed lemon juice
1 medium English seedless cucumber sliced and quartered
1 pint cherry tomatoes or grape tomatoes, halved
1/2 cup crumbled reduced fat feta cheese

instructions.text: Bring 1 ¼ cups water to a boil in a medium (2-quart) saucepan
Add the couscous, return to a boil, then cover and reduce the heat to a simmer
Cook until the liquid is absorbed, about 20 minutes, then fluff with a fork and set aside
In the bottom of a large bowl, whisk together lemon zest, lemon juice, olive oil, mustard, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, then taste and add additional seasoning as desired
While the couscous is still warm, add it to the bowl with dressing and toss to coat
Place in the refrigerator for 5-10 minutes to allow the couscous to cool
When ready to serve, add remaining ingredients: arugula, cucumber, tomatoes, feta, etc.
Toss to combine and serve cold or at room temperature

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ pounds (24 ounces) fresh leaf spinach, or 2/3 pound frozen

instructions.text: In a large skillet melt the butter with the garlic and onions and cook on medium low for 8-10 minutes until onions are translucent
Add kosher salt, black pepper and nutmeg and mix
Add flour and mix constantly over low and cook for 2-3 minutes until aroma is a bit nutty
Add half an half and cook until boiling
Add mozzarella cheese and cream cheese and cook for 6-8 minutes until mixture has thickened
In a separate large pan, melt a little bit of butter and saute spinach until it is reduced
If needed, add a little bit of milk to cheese mixture to thin it out
Slowly pour cheese mixture into cooked spinach until you reach the desired ratio of spinach to cheese, add Parmesan cheese, and stir to combine

ingredients.raw: 1 large cucumber, seeded cut into 1/8-inch slices and halved

instructions.text: Combine the vinegar, sugar, water, salt, and red pepper flakes in a small pan
Cook over a medium heat, stirring until it boils and the sugar is dissolved
Remove from heat
Add cucumber slices and stir
Let rest 10 minutes
Transfer cucumbers to a sealable container and refrigerate to cool until ready to use

ingredients.raw: Red pepper flakes or Korean chili flakes

instructions.text: Cut the ends off the cucumbers and cut them into slices
Generously salt and massage cucumbers, then set aside while they release excess moisture, about 10 minutes
In a measuring glass or small bowl, mix remaining ingredients
After 10 minutes, rinse and strain the cucumbers
Pour sauce mixture over cucumbers and toss to combine
If time allows, let them sit for at least 30 minutes, or serve immediately
Store leftovers in the fridge and eat within 3-4 days

ingredients.raw: 2 ounces smoked salmon, cut into small pieces (optional)

instructions.text: Slice cucumbers and add to a large bowl
Add remaining ingredients in bowl with cucumbers and toss to combine
Serve immediately and store leftovers in the fridge for 2-3 days

ingredients.raw: However many green beans you want

ingredients.note: Olive oil Onion powder Garlic powder Salt Pepper

ingredients.raw: If they are called Haricot Verts, French green beans, they do not need to be cut

instructions.text: Trim both ends of beans
Using an oil sprayer coat the beans with olive oil
Sprinkle seasonings in for flavor
Stick in oven at 425°F convection (or regular bake) for 10 minutes
Turn off oven and leave in there until ready to be served

ingredients.raw: 3/4 cup low fat mayonnaise (plus extra if needed/ desired)

ingredients.note: If water gets warm, drain and fill again with cold water

ingredients.raw: May want to add an extra spoonful of mayonnaise before serving

instructions.text: Prepare pasta according to box directions
Strain and cool pasta:
While pasta is straining, dice carrots, onion, and pepper
Combine pasta with vegetables
Mix in mayonnaise, pepper seasoning and kosher salt, then refrigerate until serving

ingredients.raw: 1/4 cup of Crema Mexican Sour Cream or regular sour cream
2 cloves of garlic, crushed (or finely minced)

instructions.text: Heat your grill to roughly 400 degrees F.
Place the corn on the grill and grill for roughly 12 minutes, turning the cobs 1/4 turn every 3 minutes.
Mix the topping sauce by stirring together theSour Cream, mayonnaise, cotija cheese, garlic, lime zest and juice, and cilantro.
Generously top each corn cob with the cheese mixture, sprinkle with a bit of chipotle chili powder, and top with a bit of extra cotija cheese and cilantro.

ingredients.raw: 1/4 cup Mexican crema (or use sour cream or Greek yogurt)
1/2 cup finely crumbled cotija cheese, feta cheese or queso fresco

instructions.text: Heat a large skillet over high heat
Add the corn to the hot pan, and cook stirring constantly but slowly until it starts to have char marks in places, 3-5 minutes, stirring constantly so it doesn’t burn.
In a medium bowl mix together all other ingredients and then mix in the corn.
Sprinkle the dish with the cheese and lime juice.

recipes.title: Onion Rings
notes: Air Fryer*

ingredients.raw: 1 large yellow sweet onion, sliced 1/2-inch thick and separated into rings
