Using stand mixer fitted with paddle, beat butter and sugar on medium speed until pale and fluffy, about 3 minutes
Add egg and beat, scraping down bowl as needed, then add vanilla and mix
Reduce speed to low, add flour mix in 3 additions, alternating with buttermilk in 2 adds
Give batter final stir by hand to ensure that no flour pockets remain
Using and ice cream scoop or 1/3-cup dry measuring cup, scoop 6 mounds of batter onto each prepared sheet, spaced about 3 inches apart
Bake until centers spring back when lightly pressed, 15-18 minutes, switching and rotating sheets halfway through baking, then remove from oven and let cool completely
To Make The Filling: Using stand mixer fitted with paddle, beat butter and sugar on medium speed until fluffy, about 3 minutes, then add in vanilla and salt
Add marshmallow creme and mix until combined, about 2 minutes
Refrigerate filling until slightly firm, about 30 minutes
Place 1/3 cup filling on bottom of half of cakes, then top with remaining cakes, pressing to spread filling to edge

ingredients.raw: 1 cup unsalted butter softened, room temperature (do not microwave)

instructions.text: Ingredients
Preheat oven to 325°F
Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans, then set aside
In a large bowl, cream together butter and sugar
Add in egg yolks and vanilla, mixing until fully incorporated, then set aside
In a separate bowl combine flour, baking powder and salt
Gradually add dry ingredients into wet ingredients, alternating with the buttermilk
Mix until batter is fluffy but be careful not to over mix
Beat egg whites until stiff and thick, until it holds a nice peak
Very gently fold egg whites into batter and mix JUST until incorporated
Pour batter into prepared pans and spread into even layers
Bake for 30-35 minutes
Remove from oven and let cake cool in pans until pans are warm to the touch
Carefully remove cakes from pan and place on a cooling rack to finish cooling
When cakes are completely cooled frost with chocolate buttercream frosting

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ cup vodka (preferably plain but flavor might be ok)

instructions.text: Boil 2 cups of water and pour into large measuring cup
Mix in jell-o and stir for a minute
Add cold water and mix
Add vodka and mix
Pour mixture into plastic cups and refrigerate for a minimum of two hours to overnight
Mix together 3 bottles of pink moscato, half a 52-ounce bottle of orange juice, 15-ounce vodka, 15-ounce schnapps, 1 60-ounce carton of fruit punch

ingredients.raw: 1 ½ tablespoons peanut butter (Preferably, one with honey in it)
Optional to sweeten: 1 packet (2 teaspoons) Truvia or 1 tablespoon of honey

instructions.text: Add banana, strawberries, milk and yogurt and blend together
Add peanut butter and blend
If desired, add sweetener (sugar or honey)
May want to add more sweetener if not using peanut butter with honey in it

Mix together 1 46-ounce can pineapple juice, half a 64-ounce bottle of cranberry juice, half a 52-ounce bottle of orange juice, fill the pineapple can with half coconut rum (Malibu) and half regular rum (Bacardi)
Slice all fruit or pour frozen food and add to pitcher
Add rest of ingredients to pitcher, mix, and serve

ingredients.raw: 1 bottle of red moscato or other sweet red wine
1 cup pineapple orange juice (or 1/2 cup of each pineapple juice and orange juice)
Fruit of your choice (fresh or frozen):
ingredients.note: Mixed berries or mixed fruit Apples Orange slices Anything else you want

instructions.text: Slice all fruit or pour frozen food and add to pitcher
Add wine and brandy
Make simple syrup by adding water and sugar to measuring cup and heating in microwave for 1 minute
Add simple syrup to pitcher and mix
Refrigerate for at least an hour and enjoy!

ingredients.note: Boil 1/2 cup sugar and 1/2 cup water until liquid is clear

instructions.text: Place a layer of fruit at the bottom of the pitcher, starting with one slice of orange cut in half) and lemon slices
Pour brandy into pitcher and muddle with fruit
Pour simple syrup and apples, and let it sit for a few minutes to infuse
Pour the entire bottle of wine in
Add berries just before serving or leave on the side for people to add in themselves

ingredients.raw: 3 tablespoons agave, honey, or hot honey
Optional: Chili lime powder, salt, or sugar
Can also strain directly into cocktail shaker, but it may get a little messy

instructions.text: Optional: Dip glass in honey or rim with lime juice, then chili lime powder, salt, or sugar
In a large measuring glass, combine blackberries, jalapeños, lime juice, and honey
Muddle ingredients in measuring glass
Strain mixture into another large measuring glass and pour into a cocktail shaker
Leaving the blackberry mixture in the strainer, pour the tequila through the strainer into the cocktail shaker
Add ice to cocktail shaker
Shake strain and pour into glasses

ingredients.raw: Frying oil (we like canola), as needed
Black pepper, freshly ground, as needed
1 lb, 10 ½ ounces pastry flour (or all-purpose)
You want skin-on thighs, drumsticks and two whole, boneless breasts
The dark meat is going to be cooked longer
The chicken is already cooked - you are just “cooking” the crust

instructions.text: Heat water to 155°F
Divide the chicken into pieces
Season the pieces all over with salt and pepper
Place the pieces into sous vide bags, dark meat with dark meat and breasts with breasts
Transfer breasts to the fridge to chill
Cook dark meat in water for at least two hours
Lower the temp to 145°F and add breasts and cook all pieces for an additional hour
Heat at least 3 inches of frying oil in a Dutch oven or stockpot over high heat until the oil reaches about 400°F
To make the breading, remove cooked chicken pieces from the water and pat dry
Cut breasts in half, lengthwise, and place chicken pieces on a metal rack
Mix the dry ingredients together in a bowl and set aside
Add buttermilk to a second bowl
If you prefer your chicken crunchy, dredge pieces in flour, then buttermilk, then flour again
If you prefer your chicken crispy, just dunk the pieces in the buttermilk, move them to the bowl with the dry ingredients, then fry
Working in batches, fry the chicken pieces in the oil until they’ve got a golden crust, about 2-3 minutes
Transfer the finished pieces to the wire rack in the oven to keep warm
